[Isaiah says, ]{.class-0}["Until the cities be wasted without inhabitant, and the houses without man, and the land be utterly desolate, And the LORD have removed men far away, and there be a great forsaking in the midst of the land."]{.class-2}[ That's Isaiah 6:11--12, and the context is the Tribulation. In Isaiah 6:13, a tenth of those Jews are being killed and eaten, just as the Antichrist will do (see the comments on Psa. 16:4 in that commentary).]{.class-0}

[You will find the same thing in Isaiah 24: ]{.class-0}["Behold, the LORD maketh the earth empty, and maketh it waste, and turneth it upside down, and scattereth abroad the inhabitants thereof\....The land shall be utterly emptied, and utterly spoiled\...The earth mourneth and fadeth away, the haughty people of the earth do languish. The earth also is defiled under the inhabitants thereof; because they have transgressed the laws, changed the ordinance, broken the everlasting covenant]{.class-2}[ \[that's the covenant God made with Abraham ]{.class-0}[giving those Jews the Promised Land]{.class-1}[---see Gen. 15:18; Psa. 105:8--10\]]{.class-0}[. Therefore hath the curse devoured the earth, and they that dwell therein are desolate: therefore the inhabitants of the earth are burned and few men left"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 24:1--6).]{.class-0}

[That desolation at the end of the Tribulation is so bad that the Lord compares it with the state of the earth in Genesis 1:2---]{.class-0}["without form, and void"]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 4:23 cf. Jer. 9:10--11, 12:4). The picture in verse 3 is Noah's Flood. ]{.class-0}["I will consume man and beast\...the fowls"]{.class-2}[---God did that in the Flood. ]{.class-0}["And the fishes of the sea."]{.class-2}[ Of course, the fish survived the Flood, but a lot of them still died, which is why you find fish fossils at the tops of mountains. In the Tribulation, a third of the sea life dies (Rev. 8:9). So in Matthew 24:37 and Luke 17:26, the Bible compares what happened in Noah's time with what will happen when the Lord comes back: ]{.class-0}["as it was in the days of Noe."]{.class-2}

"[I will also stretch out mine hand upon Judah"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 4). ]{.class-0}[That's anti-Semitism. ]{.class-1}[Who is that? ]{.class-0}[That's the Lord killing His own people.]{.class-1}[ Brethren, the greatest anti-Semite in the world is not the KKK or Adolf Hitler or the Pope or Mohammed (whose last prayer was for Allah to "destroy the Jews and the Christians"---A. Sprenger, ]{.class-0}["The Life and Teachings of Mohammed,"]{.class-1}[ Vol. III \[Berlin, 1861, pp. 211, 522\]; it is God Almighty. The most terrible verse in the Old Testament is the Lord talking about what He's going to do to that Jew if he doesn't behave himself.]{.class-0}

"[And it shall come to pass, that as the LORD rejoiced over you to do you good, and to multiply you; so the LORD will rejoice over you to destroy you, and to bring you to nought"]{.class-2}[ (Deut. 28:63).]{.class-0}

[The thing you have to remember when you read verses like that is that the Jews are ]{.class-0}[still]{.class-1}[ God's chosen people. ]{.class-0}["God HATH NOT cast away his people which he foreknew"]{.class-2}[ (Rom. 11:2). He's going to save that nation at the end of the Tribulation (Rom. 11:26), and in the meantime, you are to treat them as ]{.class-0}["beloved for the fathers' sakes"]{.class-2}[ (Rom. 11:28). God beats those Jews enough without ]{.class-0}[you]{.class-1}[ lifting a finger against them.]{.class-0}

"[And upon all the inhabitants of Jerusalem."]{.class-2}[ That's what happened with Nebuchadnezzar, but it also happened with Titus in A.D. 70, and it will happen a third time with the Antichrist (Zech. 12:2, 14:2). ]{.class-0}[That's three times that city is destroyed.]{.class-1}[ Do you know how many times the destruction of Jerusalem is recorded in your Bible? It's recorded once in 2 Kings 25, it's recorded a second time in 2 Chronicles 36, and it's recorded a third time in Jeremiah 52. That's three places to let you know it's going to take place ]{.class-0}[three times.]{.class-1}

Naturally, all the scholars miss it. They miss it because they spend all their time correcting that Book. They think they are smart enough to correct the Book when they don't even know what's in it.

"[And I will cut off the remnant of Baal from this place, and the name of the Chemarims with the priests; And them that worship the host of heaven upon the housetops; and them that worship and that swear by the LORD, and that swear by Malcham"]{.class-2}[ (vss. 4--5). Now what you have here is a bunch of professing ]{.class-0}[monotheists]{.class-1}[ (see James 2:19) that are not right with God, so they are worshipping and swearing by four different gods: ]{.class-0}["Baal"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 4), ]{.class-0}["the host of heaven"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 5---astrology), ]{.class-0}["the LORD"]{.class-2}[ (that's Jehovah, vs. 5), and ]{.class-0}["Malcham"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 5---spelled ]{.class-0}["Milcom"]{.class-2}[ in 1 Kings 11:5, 33; 2 Kings 23:13; another name for ]{.class-0}["Molech,"]{.class-2}[ cf. 1 Kings 11:7). It's kind of like the Catholics having Jesus and Mary. They profess to believe in the Deity of Christ and that He's the one, true God manifest in the flesh, but then they pray to Mary. How can a Jewish woman ]{.class-0}[hear 900 million Catholics praying to her at the same time]{.class-1}[ unless she was God?]{.class-0}

[You say, "There Ruckman goes hitting the Catholics again." No, I'm hitting you because you're narrow minded and stupid when it comes to ]{.class-0}[the truth ]{.class-1}[because the truth hurts. Only God can hear 900 million people praying to Him at the same time. So when a Catholic prays to Mary, he elevates her to the place of God; that's why they call Mary a "co-Redemptrix" with Christ. They say Christ is God, and they know Mary is His mother, so they call Mary the "mother of God" ("Holy Mary, mother of God, pray for us," etc.). Well, if Mary is God's mother, I wonder who's God's ]{.class-0}[grandmother.]{.class-1}[ Did you ever think about ]{.class-0}[that?]{.class-1}[ I mean if He had a mother, then didn't He have to have a grandmother? (Don't lose your sense of humor, here.)]{.class-0}

[Now when you move a deity to where it is almost equal with God or Christ, it is for the purpose of ]{.class-0}[lessening Him.]{.class-1}[ The Catholics say that you have a better chance of getting your prayers answered if you have Christ's mother ask Him for you, the idea being that Jesus is up in Heaven still listening to "momma" and doing what she says. Mary is always there with the baby, or she's there holding a dead Christ. She controls Him. ]{.class-0}[The little baby or the dead Christ can't cause you any trouble. ]{.class-1}[That's not the Lord we worship. What you had better watch out for is that holy Lord with ]{.class-0}["eyes\...as a flame of fire"]{.class-2}[ who has a ]{.class-0}["sharp twoedged sword"]{.class-2}[ coming out of His mouth (Rev. 1:14--16).]{.class-0}

[Now what's going on in verses 4--5 is that when Manasseh became King of Judah in 2 Kings 21, he brought back Baal worship to Judah and worshipped ]{.class-0}["all the hosts of heaven"]{.class-2}[ (2 Kings 21:3). He actually built altars for them in the Temple (2 Kings 21:5) and set up an idol there (2 Kings 21:7). That's what Zephaniah is preaching against here in verses 4--5. When Josiah became King, he got rid of all that (see 2 Kings 23:5). ]{.class-0}

[You see those ]{.class-0}["Chemarims"]{.class-2}[ in verse 4? That's a transliteration of the Hebrew word ]{.class-0}[kamar]{.class-1}[ which only appears three times in the Old Testament: here; Hosea 10:5; and 2 Kings 23:5. In 2 Kings 23:5, the ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ translators translated the word as ]{.class-0}["idolatrous priests."]{.class-2}[ So what you have in verses 4--5 here in Zephaniah 1 is a priesthood of Baal, Molech, and the stars operating in the Temple right alongside the legitimate priesthood, and God tells them that He's going to wipe out the real priests right along with the fake ones.]{.class-0}

[Now if Josiah cleaned that thing up, why did the Lord say He was going to do that? Because once Josiah was dead, his sons and grandson became Kings and brought the whole mess back in. Look at Ezekiel 8. That's about thirty years after the death of Josiah, and you have the idol back in the Temple (Ezek. 8:5--6), pictures on the walls just like television (Ezek. 8:7--12), women weeping for a pagan god named Tammuz (Ezek. 8:14), and sun worship (Ezek. 8:19). The whole cotton-pickin' mess that Josiah got rid of is right back in there. You read over in Jeremiah 44 that the women were praying to ]{.class-0}["the queen of heaven" ]{.class-2}[while their husbands were going to Jeremiah to inquire of the Lord.]{.class-0}

"[And them that are turned back from the LORD"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 6). Isaiah said, ]{.class-0}["Ah sinful nation, a people laden with iniquity, a seed of evildoers, children that are corrupters: they have forsaken the LORD, they have provoked the Holy One of Israel unto anger, they have gone away backward"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 1:4). That's called "backsliding" in the Old Testament (Jer. 3:6, 8, 11--12, 14, 22, 8:5; Hos. 4:16, 11:7, etc.); the New Testament term is "out of fellowship with God."]{.class-0}

"[And those that have not sought the LORD, nor enquired for him."]{.class-2}[ Isaiah 55:6 says, ]{.class-0}["Seek ye the LORD while he may be found, call ye upon him while he is near."]{.class-2}

[Rick Warren and all the "purpose-driven" preachers talk about having church for "seekers." What they mean by that is bringing in the coffee shops, the rap sessions, the rock music, etc., to appeal to a bunch of ]{.class-0}[lost folks]{.class-1}[ to get them in church; but once they get them in, they don't preach to them or tell them they're ]{.class-0}[sinners on their way to Hell]{.class-1}[ or even that Jesus Christ is the ]{.class-0}[only]{.class-1}[ way of salvation. Instead they teach them ]{.class-0}[self-improvement, a better sex life, how to let your wife run the family so you don't bust it up,]{.class-1}[ etc. That ain't seeking the Lord; that's coddling a bunch of soft middle-class Americans so you can get their ]{.class-0}[wallets.]{.class-1}

[You seek the Lord through the Scriptures (see Isa. 34:16) and prayer. The problem with Americans is that they aren't interested in those things. They either don't know where to inquire, or if they do, all they are interested in is what God can do for them ]{.class-0}[materially]{.class-1}[ (see James 4:1--4).]{.class-0}

[Brethren, do you know what Jesus Christ said? He said,]{.class-0}[ "But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you"]{.class-2}[ (Matt. 6:33). A lot of times when I get out there on the street preaching, I will quote that verse and wave my hand at the cars. What am I saying? I'm saying, "If you'll seek God's kingdom and His righteousness ]{.class-0}[first,]{.class-1}[ all this other ]{.class-0}[junk]{.class-1}[ will be added to you." That's the cars, the clothes, the food in your belly, the job, etc. You seek God FIRST, not]{.class-0}[ the junk.]{.class-1}

7 Hold thy peace at the presence of the Lord GOD: for the day of the LORD is at hand: for the LORD hath prepared a sacrifice, he hath bid his guests.

8 And it shall come to pass in the day of the LORD'S sacrifice, that I will punish the princes, and the king's children, and all such as are clothed with strange apparel.

9 In the same day also will I punish all those that leap on the threshold, which fill their masters' houses with violence and deceit.

10 And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the LORD, that there shall be the noise of a cry from the fish gate, and an howling from the second, and a great crashing from the hills.

11 Howl, ye inhabitants of Maktesh, for all the merchant people are cut down; all they that bear silver are cut off.

12 And it shall come to pass at that time, that I will search Jerusalem with candles, and punish the men that are settled on their lees: that say in their heart, The LORD will not do good, neither will he do evil.

13 Therefore their goods shall become a booty, and their houses a desolation: they shall also build houses, but not inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, but not drink the wine thereof.

"[Hold thy peace at the presence of the Lord GOD"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 7). That's just what you got through reading back in Habakkuk 2:20---]{.class-0}["the LORD is in his holy temple: let all the earth keep silence before him."]{.class-2}[ The reference, of course, is to the Second Advent. Look at the next part of the verse.]{.class-0}

"[For the day of the LORD is at hand." "The day of the LORD,"]{.class-2}[ that's the theme of the rest of the chapter. It's called ]{.class-0}["the day of the LORD"]{.class-2}[ and ]{.class-0}["that day."]{.class-2}[ The terms can encompass a number of things ranging from the invasions of Sennacherib and Nebuchadnezzar to the White Throne Judgment (2 Pet. 3:10--12), and we have commented on this in detail under Joel 1:15 in Volume I of this Commentary (which see). But the direct reference ]{.class-0}[here]{.class-1}[, in the context, is to the Second Advent of Christ at the Battle of Armageddon. Look at the rest of verse 7 and on into verse 8.]{.class-0}

"[For the LORD hath prepared a sacrifice, he hath bid his guests. And it shall come to pass in the day of the LORD'S sacrifice, that I will punish the princes, and the king's children, and all such as are clothed with strange apparel."]{.class-2}

That sacrifice starts up north by the Euphrates River (Jer. 46:10) and comes down to Armageddon (Rev. 19) and then through Bozrah in Edom (Isa. 34:6) via Sinai (see the comments on the route of the Second Advent under Hab. 3:3).

[Now do you know who the ]{.class-0}["guests"]{.class-2}[ are at that ]{.class-0}["sacrifice"]{.class-2}[? They're ]{.class-0}[birds. ]{.class-1}[In Revelation 19:17, an angel stands up and says: ]{.class-0}["to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great God; That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and of the flesh of all men, both free and bond, both small and great."]{.class-2}

[In Luke 17, Jesus is talking about His return.]{.class-0}[ "As it was in the days of Noe, so shall it be also in the days of the Son of man\....Even thus shall it be in the day when the Son of man is revealed"]{.class-2}[ (Luke 17:26, 30). That passage on the Second Coming ends with: ]{.class-0}["Wheresoever the body is, thither will the eagles be gathered together"]{.class-2}[ (Luke 17:37).]{.class-0}

[There's an old German song on Hermann the Defender at the Battle of the Teutoburg Forest (against the Romans in A.D. 9). The song goes: ]{.class-0}["ein zu 'nem groken frühstück,"]{.class-1}[ which means "to the great breakfast." Hermann invites this tribe of Germans called the "Cherusker" to a feast to celebrate his victory, and the song says: "]{.class-0}[Raben flogen durch die luft, und es war ein moderduft, wie von blut und leichen"---]{.class-1}["Ravens flew through the air, and it was a decaying smell as of blood and corpses." In other words, the people are sitting down to a big breakfast while the raven are feasting on the blood and corpses all around them.]{.class-0}

[That's what goes on at Armageddon. The Lord calls those birds and says, "I've made a sacrifice for you and prepared a feast for you down here; come down and eat it." Back in the very first book of the Bible ever written, the Lord Himself told you: ]{.class-0}["Doth the eagle mount up at thy command\...From thence she seeketh the prey, and her eyes behold afar off. Her young ones also suck up blood: and where the slain are, there is she"]{.class-2}[ (Job 39:27, 29--30).]{.class-0}

[So those birds come on down there and eat those bodies and drink that blood. Did you know that ]{.class-0}[vultures]{.class-1}[ are now nesting in the land of Israel after fifteen centuries. They are laying as many as four eggs in one nesting, and the Israeli air force avoids the nesting areas during the mating season. Everything is being set up, boy!]{.class-0}

"[In the same day also will I punish all those that leap on the threshold"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 9). That might have something to do with the pagan priests back in verse 4 not treading on the threshold like the priests of Dagon back in 1 Samuel 5:5 (see the comments under Hab. 2:19), but I'm not for sure on that, and neither are any of the other commentators. The reason for that is the next part of the verse.]{.class-0}

"[Which fill their masters' houses with violence and deceit."]{.class-2}[ That has nothing to do with any pagan temple. The commentators will say it has to do with a bunch of servants dancing and prancing around in the doorway because they've violently spoiled their masters' houses. My comment on the whole thing is: ]{.class-0}["Ich weiss nicht."]{.class-1}[ Verse 9 and the first part of verse 13 (]{.class-0}["Therefore their good shall become a booty, and their houses a desolation"]{.class-2}[) seem to match what Habakkuk said in Habakkuk 2:7--11, and you can see the comments on that passage.]{.class-0}

"[And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the LORD, that there shall be the noise of a cry from the fish gate"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 10). Now that ]{.class-0}["fish gate"]{.class-2}[ is one of the twelve gates of Jerusalem (see App. II of the ]{.class-0}[commentary on Ezra, Nehemiah, and]{.class-1}[ ]{.class-0}[Esther]{.class-1}[); it is on the north side of the city.]{.class-0}

"[And an howling from the second."]{.class-2}[ Now the verse doesn't say what ]{.class-0}["the second" ]{.class-2}[is, but the implication is that it is the ]{.class-0}[second gate.]{.class-1}[ There on the north side of Jerusalem, right across from ]{.class-0}["the fish gate,"]{.class-2}[ is the ]{.class-0}[sheep gate.]{.class-1}[ Do you know what's so interesting about that? Well, outside the north wall of the city is Gordon's Calvary, where Christ was crucified, so right below it are the ]{.class-0}[fish gate]{.class-1}[ and the ]{.class-0}[sheep gate]{.class-1}[. Now how did someone between 630 and 400 B.C. pick up the fact that when Christ died, He would make His disciples ]{.class-0}["fishers of men"]{.class-2}[ (Matt. 4:19) and that He would be a Good Shepherd leading ]{.class-0}[sheep]{.class-1}[ (John 10)? Who could have thought that up? Well, no one except the One who wrote that Book.]{.class-0}

"[And a great crashing from the hills."]{.class-2}[ When the Lord comes back, there's going to be what the old-timers used to call "a commotion." Look at Psalm 78:65--66.]{.class-0}

"[Then the Lord awaked as one out of sleep, and like a mighty man that shouteth by reason of wine. And he smote his enemies in the hinder parts: he put them to a perpetual reproach."]{.class-2}

That's Jesus Christ at the Second Advent. He lets out a war "whoop" like a drunken man waking up. David described it as thunder (2 Sam. 22:14; Psa. 18:13). When Christ comes back, He's yelling and shouting in a voice like thunder. The earth is shaking and mountains are melting (see the comments on Hab. 3:3). People are screaming and wailing and begging the rocks and mountains to fall on them (Rev. 6:15--17).

"[Howl, ye inhabitants of Maktesh]{.class-2}[ \[supposedly a market district in Jerusalem; the word means "mortar"\]]{.class-0}[, for all the merchant people are cut down; all they that bear silver are cut off"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 11). When FDR came into office, he took the country off the gold standard and issued "silver certificates." Those were dollar bills you could exchange for a dollar ]{.class-0}[in silver.]{.class-1}[ Around the time of JFK, the government took you off the silver and left you with the ]{.class-0}[copper]{.class-1}[ in the coins. Around the time of Bush, the price of copper was so high that you could get more out of a copper penny by selling it as scrap, so the government took away the ]{.class-0}[copper]{.class-1}[ and left you NOTHING. "Federal Reserve notes" aren't worth the paper on which they're printed; ]{.class-0}[only the government has the right to print counterfeit money.]{.class-1}

The only thing holding up the currencies of the nations is the "confidence" people have in their governments honoring their debts. America is now over nine trillion dollars in debt, with Obama adding nearly three trillion onto that amount since he took office. When Americans finally figure out there's nothing behind their money, and when China and the Moslems finally call in their debts, you are going to see the whole thing collapse. When that happened in Germany after World War I, you had rich people hauling wheelbarrows loads of "marks" to the grocery store just to buy a loaf of bread. If that ever happens in America, you are going to see doctors' and lawyers' wives fighting each other with baseball bats just to get a can of vegetables or fruit.

Now that happens in the Tribulation (Rev. 6:5--6), and when the Antichrist rebuilds the world economy, he puts it back on the gold standard. Look at Revelation 18.

"[And the merchants of the earth shall weep and mourn over her]{.class-2}[ \[Babylon the great---Rev. 18:10\]]{.class-0}[; for no man buyeth their merchandise any more"]{.class-2}[ (Rev. 18:11). What is that merchandise? ]{.class-0}["The merchandise of gold"]{.class-2}[ one, ]{.class-0}["and silver"]{.class-2}[ two (Rev. 18:12). Revelation 18:15--16 says, ]{.class-0}["The merchants of these things, which were made rich by her, shall stand afar off for the fear of her torment, weeping and wailing, And saying, Alas, alas, that great city, that was clothed in fine linen, and purple, and scarlet, and decked with gold, and precious stones, and pearls!"]{.class-2}

[That merchandise starts off with ]{.class-0}[gold]{.class-1}[ and ]{.class-0}[silver]{.class-1}[, and ends up with ]{.class-0}[slavery]{.class-1}[ (Rev. 18:13). John Brown, Julia Ward Howe, and Abraham Lincoln didn't end slavery; it's still going strong. Every Moslem country has slaves because Mohammed ]{.class-0}[approved]{.class-1}[ of slavery, ]{.class-0}[practiced]{.class-1}[ it, and ]{.class-0}[commanded]{.class-1}[ it. Every year in India 23,000 young girls go missing. Nearly all of them are sold as sex slaves to Moslems in Saudi Arabia, Yemen, the United Arab Emirates, etc. They are sold to men fifty years old and up because Mohammed himself married a nine-year-old girl (Aisha). They are sold as ]{.class-0}[wives]{.class-1}[ so that you technically can't call them ]{.class-0}[slaves]{.class-1}[, but that is exactly what they are. It's called "white slavery" here in the USA. That's what England, France, Holland, and the Democratic Party in America is worried about offending!]{.class-0}

"[And it shall come to pass at that time, that I will search Jerusalem with candles"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 11). So in Greek mythology you have Diogenes going around with a lantern searching for an honest man. Here, God is looking for ]{.class-0}["men that sigh and that cry for all the abominations that be done in the midst thereof"]{.class-2}[ (Ezek. 9:4). In Ezekiel 9, the Lord had a mark put on those people so they would be spared in the judgments; everyone who didn't have that mark was to be slain. That is what is going on here.]{.class-0}

"[And punish the men that are settled on their lees." "Settled on their lees"]{.class-2}[ is an archaic English expression that means someone is not moving. ]{.class-0}["Lees"]{.class-2}[ is the residue of wine left over at the bottom of a glass. The idea is that you finished the glass of wine and left that stuff at the bottom and haven't done anything with it since. These people have stopped doing right and are just sitting back letting the world go to Hell.]{.class-0}

"[That say in their heart, the LORD will not do good."]{.class-2}[ Those folks don't think that God gives them the good things they have. That Jew was to ]{.class-0}["remember the LORD thy God: for it is he that giveth thee power to get wealth"]{.class-2}[ (Deut. 8:18). The ones here are saying, ]{.class-0}["My power and the might of mine hand hath gotten me this wealth"]{.class-2}[ (Deut. 8:17). They aren't acknowledging the goodness of God. In Romans 1, that's what leads to sex perversion in a society (Rom. 1:21--27).]{.class-0}

"[Neither will he do evil."]{.class-2}[ God wouldn't send a ]{.class-0}[tornado]{.class-1}[ to get anybody! He wouldn't let a ]{.class-0}[hurricane]{.class-1}[ tear up the Gulf Coast where the sex perverts have been welcomed every year in order to get their money. He wouldn't send an ]{.class-0}[earthquake]{.class-1}[ on a Catholic country like Haiti that practiced voodoo for hundreds of years. He wouldn't send a ]{.class-0}[tsunami]{.class-1}[ and drown out a bunch of Japanese. He wouldn't do evil like that, would He? How much do you want to bet (see the comments on Hab. 2:13)?]{.class-0}

[He says in Deuteronomy 32:39, ]{.class-0}["See now that I, even I, am he, and there is no god with me: I KILL, and I make alive; I WOUND, and I heal: neither is there any that can deliver out of my hand."]{.class-2}

[Jeremiah said the Lord causes grief (Lam. 3:32), and ]{.class-0}["Out of the mouth of the most High proceedeth not evil and good?"]{.class-2}[ (Lam. 3:38) Job said, ]{.class-0}["What? shall we receive good at the hand of God, and shall we not receive evil?"]{.class-2}[ (Job 2:10)]{.class-0}

[You see, it's not just "Ruckman" talking. Job got both from God: he got the ]{.class-0}[good]{.class-1}[ (all the cattle and the children), and he got the ]{.class-0}[evil]{.class-1}[ (the loss of everything he had, the death of his children, and the boils), and he realized that even if God did not cause it, He certainly could have ]{.class-0}[stopped it.]{.class-1}[ Brethren, the God of that Book is not the "God" about whom you are hearing in the average sermon today. He will do good to you, and He will do evil to you (and of course, that "evil" is not ]{.class-0}[sin]{.class-1}[, but the bad effect the thing He sends has on ]{.class-0}[you]{.class-1}[).]{.class-0}

"[Therefore their gods shall become a booty, and their houses a desolation"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 13). That is, someone else gets their houses. I saw a political cartoon on this back in the 1990s. An American economic advisor is talking to the nation of Japan, and he says, "Well, what do you want from America." The Japanese reply, "We'll take California." (They already own Hawaii.) Right now, the Communist Chinese and the Moslem Arabians own the lion's share of America's debt, and if we don't knuckle under and do what they want, all they have to do is "call in their markers," and we're done for.]{.class-0}

"[They shall also build houses, but not inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, but not drink the wine thereof."]{.class-2}[ That's what God said He would do to those Jews if they didn't behave themselves in the land.]{.class-0}

"[Thou shalt plant vineyards, and dress them, but shalt neither drink of the wine, nor gather the grapes; for the worms shall eat them. Thou shalt have olive trees throughout all thy coasts, but thou shalt not anoint thyself with the oil; for thine olive shall cast his fruit. Thou shalt beget sons and daughters, but thou shalt not enjoy them; for they shall go into captivity"]{.class-2}[ (Deut. 28:39--41).]{.class-0}

Again, notice all the negative stuff that modern Americans can hardly bear. And there is still no relief in sight. I think I counted 23 negative things in the next five verses we are about to cover.

14 The great day of the LORD is near, it is near, and hasteth greatly, even the voice of the day of the LORD: the mighty man shall cry there bitterly.

15 That day is a day of wrath, a day of trouble and distress, a day of wasteness and desolation, a day of darkness and gloominess, a day of clouds and thick darkness,

16 A day of the trumpet and alarm against the fenced cities, and against the high towers.

17 And I will bring distress upon men, that they shall walk like blind men, because they have sinned against the LORD: and their blood shall be poured out as dust, and their flesh as the dung.

18 Neither their silver nor their gold shall be able to deliver them in the day of the LORD'S wrath; but the whole land shall be devoured by the fire of his jealousy: for he shall make even a speedy riddance of all them that dwell in the land.

"[The great day of the LORD is near]{.class-2}[ \[see the comments on Joel 2:1 in Vol. I of this Commentary\]]{.class-0}[\...and hasteth greatly ]{.class-2}[\[see the comments on Hab. 2:3\]]{.class-0}[, even the voice of the day of the LORD: the mighty man shall cry there bitterly ]{.class-2}[\[see the comments under vs. 10\]]{.class-0}["]{.class-2}[ (vs. 14).]{.class-0}

[Note the characteristics of ]{.class-0}["the great day of the LORD."]{.class-2}[ It ]{.class-0}["is a day of WRATH,"]{.class-2}[ not salvation. It is ]{.class-0}["a day of trouble and distress"]{.class-2}[; there's no mercy or love. It is ]{.class-0}["a day of wasteness and desolation"]{.class-2}[; it ]{.class-0}[isn't]{.class-1}[ "your best life now" (Osteen) or "possibility thinking" (Schuller) or "prosperity gospel" (the Charismatics). It is ]{.class-0}["a day of darkness and gloominess, a day of clouds and thick darkness"]{.class-2}[ (see the comments on Joel 2:2 in Vol. I of this Commentary); there's not a ray of light.]{.class-0}

[That's the Second Advent; it's nothing like the first time Christ came.]{.class-1}[ When He came the first time, it was as a lowly lamb humbling Himself as a servant. He washed the dirty feet of His disciples. He said, ]{.class-0}["Suffer the little children to come unto me"]{.class-2}[ (Mark 10:14). He said, ]{.class-0}["Henceforth I call you not servants\...but I have called you friends"]{.class-2}[ (John 15:15). His First Coming was ]{.class-0}["For God so loved the world"]{.class-2}[ and all that sort of thing. But not here. Here it is the roaring ]{.class-0}["Lion of the tribe of Juda"]{.class-2}[ (Rev. 5:5). As the little boy said, "The Lord is coming back, and BOY IS HE EVER MAD."]{.class-0}

"[A day of the trumpet ]{.class-2}[\[see Joel 2:1; Zech. 9:14\]]{.class-0}[ and alarm against the fenced cities]{.class-2}[ \[see Jer. 4:19--20\]]{.class-0}[, and against the high towers"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 16). Isaiah 30:25 says, ]{.class-0}["And there shall be upon every high mountain, and upon every high hill, rivers and streams of waters in the day of the great slaughter, when the towers fall."]{.class-2}[ There's two prophecies, one in 750 B.C. and the other in 630 B.C., telling you that right before the Lord comes back, some high towers are going to fall. The Twin ]{.class-0}[Towers]{.class-1}[ in New York City on "9-11" were just a preview of "bigger and better things" to come.]{.class-0}

"[And I will bring distress upon men, that they shall walk like blind men, because they have sinned against the LORD"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 17). They are staggering around in the dark. The Lord told those Jews: ]{.class-0}["The LORD shall smite thee with madness, and blindness, and astonishment of heart: And thou shalt grope at noonday, as the blind gropeth in darkness"]{.class-2}[ (Deut. 28:28--29). Why is that? ]{.class-0}["Because they have sinned against the LORD."]{.class-2}

[Proverbs 4:19 says, ]{.class-0}["The way of the wicked is as darkness: they know not at what they stumble."]{.class-2}[ Now that's a ]{.class-0}[spiritual]{.class-1}[ darkness that applies to every lost man, woman, boy, and girl ]{.class-0}[right now.]{.class-1}[ Paul said, ]{.class-0}["Having the understanding darkened, being alienated from the life of God through the ignorance that is in them, because of the blindness of their heart"]{.class-2}[ (Eph. 4:18). That blindness can be cured by ]{.class-0}[reading]{.class-1}[ or ]{.class-0}[hearing]{.class-1}[ the words of God and ]{.class-0}[believing]{.class-1}[ them: ]{.class-0}["The entrance of thy words giveth light; it giveth understanding unto the simple"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 119:130).]{.class-0}

[But during the Tribulation, that darkness is a ]{.class-0}[physical]{.class-1}[ darkness. At the end of the Tribulation, all those people who have taken the Mark of the Beast are in pitch-black darkness with all hell breaking loose. The only cure for that darkness is the return of Jesus Christ.]{.class-0}

"[Because they have sinned against the LORD."]{.class-2}[ Now there's the problem; that is what is going to land you right in Hell. Of course, you don't have to worry about the babies and the little innocent boys and girls. Yes, they have a sin nature, but they are safe until they understand that the wrong they are doing is sinning ]{.class-0}[against God Himself]{.class-1}[ (see the comments on Rom. 4:15 in that Commentary). That is not just knowing "right from wrong"; it's knowing the difference ]{.class-0}["between good and evil"]{.class-2}[ (Deut. 1:39). That is, it is knowing that the wrong they've done is an ]{.class-0}[evil done against God.]{.class-1}

[It's Adam and Eve running to hide after they did wrong because they knew they had ]{.class-0}[disobeyed God.]{.class-1}[ Joseph told Potiphar's wife: ]{.class-0}["how then can I do this great wickedness, and sin against God?"]{.class-2}[ (Gen. 39:9). After committing adultery with Bathsheba, David prayed to the Lord and said: ]{.class-0}["Against thee, thee only, have I sinned, and done this evil in thy sight"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 51:4). You've got to realize that your wrongdoing is against your Maker.]{.class-0}

[Of course, that's not what Mohammed believed. ]{.class-1}[In the ]{.class-0}[Koran,]{.class-1}[ he said that ]{.class-0}[no man sins against Allah; he just sins against himself ]{.class-1}[(Sura 4:111). That's the ]{.class-0}["Holy" Koran]{.class-1}[; that's the Moslems. That's the people the British are worried about ]{.class-0}[offending;]{.class-1}[ they're not worried about offending God Almighty.]{.class-0}

[Well, if you don't sin against Allah, what are you doing going to Hell when you die? Mohammed has a Hell for people to go to. ]{.class-0}[For what? ]{.class-1}[None of them sinned against Allah. ]{.class-0}[Why, "Allah" is a dirty dog to send folks to Hell when they haven't done anything against him.]{.class-1}

[Back to verse 17: ]{.class-0}["and their blood shall be poured out as dust."]{.class-2}[ That's the Second Advent: the blood is flowing five feet deep (Rev. 14:20; see also Deut. 32:42; Psa. 68:23; Isa. 9:5, 63:1--3; Ezek. 14:19).]{.class-0}

"[And their flesh as the dung."]{.class-2}[ You won't find that last word "updated" in the modern versions. Now look at that---the very idea of saying your blood is going to be like dust and your flesh like\...(you know the word). I mean, who would preach stuff like that? ]{.class-0}[Zephaniah did.]{.class-1}

[Now that's God's assessment of man's "worth": ]{.class-0}["dust"]{.class-2}[ and ]{.class-0}["dung."]{.class-2}[ The Lord made Adam from ]{.class-0}["the dust of the ground"]{.class-2}[ (Gen. 2:7), and one of these days, if the Lord tarries, every one of us is going to be put to bed with a shovel. ]{.class-0}["For dust thou art, and unto dust shalt thou return"]{.class-2}[ (Gen. 3:19). You'll be a couple of hundred pounds of worm food and literally be turned into dung.]{.class-0}

[Folks don't like to think about that. You get pumped full of embalming fluid when you die to make your body last longer, and they tell me now that there are some new ways of making caskets where they don't rot or let the worms in. Who would care, man? ]{.class-0}[I mean, you're not there anyway. ]{.class-1}[Those Egyptians mummified their dead better than anybody before or since, and 3,000 years later, the Europeans came along and dug them up and used a lot of them to stoke the boilers on steam engines. You aren't going to beat God out no matter what you do.]{.class-0}

"[Neither their silver nor their gold]{.class-2}[ \[see the comments on vs. 11\]]{.class-0}[ shall be able to deliver them in the day of the LORD'S wrath"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 18). Proverbs 11:4 says, ]{.class-0}["Riches profit not in the day of wrath: but righteousness delivereth from death."]{.class-2}[ Money won't be able to deliver you from God's wrath. Peter wrote:]{.class-0}[ "Forasmuch as ye know that ye were not redeemed with corruptible things, as silver and gold"]{.class-2}[ (1 Pet. 1:18). Money won't get you out of Hell.]{.class-0}

[Do you know what happened when the Titanic went down? Some of those rich folks were offering people \$1,000 for a seat in a lifeboat; ]{.class-0}[they didn't have any "takers."]{.class-1}[ One woman left all her jewelry in her stateroom and took a couple of ]{.class-0}[oranges]{.class-1}[ with her, which was a smart thing to do just in case the survivors didn't get picked up right away. Ezekiel 7:19 says that when the day of God's wrath comes, the silver and gold will be thrown out on the streets---it'll be worthless.]{.class-0}

"[The whole land shall be devoured by the fire of his jealousy."]{.class-2}[ The Lord said, ]{.class-0}["I the LORD thy God am a jealous God"]{.class-2}[ (Exod. 20:5). People don't like that. They think God's being petty and a bully. What they don't understand is that the Lord is the only one who ]{.class-0}[does]{.class-1}[ have a right to be that way. He's the Creator; He's the only true God; He deserves all the praise and worship. The saints in Glory sing: ]{.class-0}["Thou art worthy to take the book, and to open the seals thereof: for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to God by thy blood out of every kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation"]{.class-2}[ (Rev. 5:9).]{.class-0}

[That's why God gets jealous over other gods: they didn't do ]{.class-0}[anything]{.class-1}[ for their people. Allah never did anything for any Mohammedan; my Prophet ]{.class-0}[died]{.class-1}[ for me.]{.class-0}

[First Kings 14:22--23 says, ]{.class-0}["And Judah did evil in the sight of the LORD, and they provoked him to jealousy with their sins which they had committed, above all that their fathers had done. For they also built them high places, and images, and groves, on every high hill, and under every green tree."]{.class-2}

[Not only that, but they also gave the queers and faggots special privileges (]{.class-0}["sodomites"]{.class-2}[---1 Kings 14:24). So what did God do? He sent Shishak in to take all the gold and silver from them (1 Kings 14:25--26) and gave them continual war with Israel (1 Kings 14:30). "War is God's judgment on sin here; Hell is God's judgment on sin hereafter." No nation can live like America is living right now and get away with it.]{.class-0}

Let's try another one---Ezekiel 36:5--7.

"[Therefore thus saith the Lord GOD; Surely in the fire of my jealousy ]{.class-2}[\[just like you read it in Zeph. 1:18\] ]{.class-0}[have I spoken against the residue of the heathen]{.class-2}[ \[what's left of the UN at the end of the Tribulation\]]{.class-0}[, and against all Idumea ]{.class-2}[\[another name for Edom\]]{.class-0}[, which have appointed MY LAND into THEIR possession\...."]{.class-2}[ That's the UN, the "Palestinians," the Moslems, the Catholics, Bush, Obama, etc.; they all agreed that the land of Israel should be taken away from the people to whom God gave it---those Jews---and make it ]{.class-0}[theirs]{.class-1}[.]{.class-0}

"[\...with the joy of all their heart, with despiteful minds, to cast it out for a prey. Prophesy therefore concerning the land of Israel, and say unto the mountains, and to the hills, to the rivers, and to the valleys, Thus saith the Lord God; Behold, I have spoken in my jealousy and in my fury, because ye have borne the shame of the heathen: Therefore thus saith the Lord GOD; I have lifted up mine hand, Surely the heathen that are about you ]{.class-2}[\[Lebanon---Moslem, Syria---Moslem, Iraq---Moslem, Jordan---Moslem, Egypt---Moslem, Saudi Arabia---Moslem\]]{.class-0}[, they shall bear their shame."]{.class-2}

You talk about "tomorrow's headlines today," that Book always runs 2,000 to 4,000 years ahead of the newspapers!

[Back to verse 18: ]{.class-0}["for he shall make even a speedy riddance of all them that dwell in the land." ]{.class-2}[And of course, that is aimed at the disobedient Jews to whom Zephaniah is preaching. Now let me ask you this: if God treated His own chosen people like that, what makes you think He's going to let America off the hook? I mean, some of you Christians who think America is a Christian nation that kind of took the place of Israel, if God did that to those Jews, what do you think He's going to do to the United States?]{.class-0}

[You see, Christians like to claim the ]{.class-0}[blessings]{.class-1}[ God gave the Jews but not the ]{.class-0}[curses]{.class-1}[, but you can't do that. If God did bless America because it started out with that Book like Israel did, then He's going to judge it for departing from that Book just like He did to Israel when ]{.class-0}[they]{.class-1}[ departed from it.]{.class-0}

[]{#section-0_1_8e0c2e66e8bcd534_b687.xhtml}

CHAPTER TWO

2:1 Gather yourselves together, yea, gather together, O nation not desired;

2 Before the decree bring forth, before the day pass as the chaff, before the fierce anger of the LORD come upon you, before the day of the LORD'S anger come upon you.

3 Seek ye the LORD, all ye meek of the earth, which have wrought his judgment; seek righteousness, seek meekness: it may be ye shall be hid in the day of the LORD'S anger.

[Notice the ]{.class-0}["nation,"]{.class-2}[ ]{.class-0}[singular,]{.class-1}[ in verse 1. It is not aimed at the United Nations; it is aimed at ]{.class-0}[one]{.class-1}[ nation---Israel.]{.class-0}

[Right now, Israel is a ]{.class-0}["nation not desired."]{.class-2}[ For the last 2,000 years, the nation has been put away by God (Isa. 50:1; Hos. 2:2). Christ said, ]{.class-0}["The kingdom of God shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof"]{.class-2}[ (Matt. 21:43). Paul said that ]{.class-0}["wrath is unto them to the uttermost"]{.class-2}[(1 Thess. 2:16; NOT ]{.class-0}["finally and forever"]{.class-1}[ as the corrupt ]{.class-0}[Amplified Version]{.class-1}[ put out by the Lockman Foundation---the publishers of the ]{.class-0}[NASV]{.class-1}[---reads).]{.class-0}

[Those Jews are ]{.class-0}[temporarily]{.class-1}[ out of the will of God, and they are subject to the wrath of God, and ]{.class-0}[nobody]{.class-1}[ desires them. Before Hitler put the Jews in the extermination camps, he offered to let the Jews leave Germany and Europe if other nations would take them in. Australia, New Zealand, Canada, France, Holland, Denmark, South America, AND THE UNITED STATES all turned them down. You can get the work ]{.class-0}[Israel: A Deadly Piece of Dirt]{.class-1}[ and read about the mess Roosevelt went through to ]{.class-0}[keep those Jews from coming over here. ]{.class-1}[The Lord told them: ]{.class-0}["ye shall be sold unto your enemies for bondmen and bondwomen, and no man shall buy you" ]{.class-2}[(Deut. 28:68).]{.class-0}

[Now the "gathering" in verse 1 is a corporate call to repentance as the children of Israel did under Ezra and Nehemiah (Ezra 10:7; Neh. 9:1). In the Tribulation, that gathering takes place at the Feast of Tabernacles when the Lord comes back (see the comments on Joel 1:14, 2:16 in Vol. I of this Commentary). Look at verse 2: ]{.class-0}["Before the decree bring forth]{.class-2}[ \[i.e., before I fulfill what I'm going to do\]]{.class-0}[, before the day pass as the chaff ]{.class-2}[\[see the comments on threshing under Hab. 3:12\]]{.class-0}[, before the fierce anger of the LORD come upon you, before the DAY OF THE LORD'S ANGER come upon you."]{.class-2}

Of course, practically, that's what any sinner should do. Before you hit God's judgment in Hell, you should repent and receive Christ. During the time of Josiah, the Lord was determined to wipe out Judah because of the sins of Manasseh, but because Josiah repented and led the nation in revival, God had mercy and postponed His judgment (2 Kings 22:15--20 cf. 23:24--27). Even Ahab, the worst King the northern kingdom of Israel ever had, found mercy from God when he humbled himself (1 Kings 21:27--29). Before you get it in the neck, REPENT!

"[Seek ye the LORD"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 3). He's talking to the ones ]{.class-0}["that have not sought the LORD" ]{.class-2}[back in 1:6 (see the comments on that verse). Isaiah said, ]{.class-0}["Seek ye the LORD while he may be found"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 55:6); Amos wrote, ]{.class-0}["Seek the LORD, and ye shall live" ]{.class-2}[(Amos 5:6).]{.class-0}

One cold December years ago in 1948, I was going home drunk from work around Christmas time, and I went by the Church of the Little Flower, a Roman Catholic church at the head of Five Points in Mobile, Alabama. I walked by a manger scene there with the wise men and the shepherds and all that stuff. There was a little bell tinkling and a record playing Christmas carols.

As I went by, that record was playing: "Joy to the world, the Lord is come; let earth receive her King. Let every heart prepare Him room, and Heaven and nature sing." I stood there listening to that thing. I had on a black shirt and a yellow necktie and a Panama suit in December with four cigars in each pocket, and I had a moustache. I was five feet eight-and-a-half inches with a 28-inch waist line, and I weighed 170 pounds. I was so mean that I didn't even love myself.

I stood there looking at that manger scene and listening to that music, and I began to cry. I could have just shot myself for that; I didn't even know why I began to cry. A tear rolled down my cheek, and I began to cuss: "Joy to the world; Merry Christmas---Bah! Humbug! What a bunch of blankety-blanks!"

Of course, I didn't know then that I had a mother-in-law praying for me up in the "black belt" of Alabama; I didn't find that out until later. I walked into the rectory, the place where the Priest lived right next door to the church. I went in there without even knocking: I just opened the door and walked right into the living room. The Priest was a young fellow about my age, 26 or 27. He was sitting there in front of a fireplace, and of all things, he was reading a Bible (will miracles never cease)?!

[I stepped in there and stood right in front of him and said, "What does the Good Book say, Father?" I don't know why I said that except that I may have heard it somewhere. The last time I had seen one, I called it ]{.class-0}[baloney.]{.class-1}

[Back in the Philippines, my commanding officer, Lieutenant Self, pulled a Bible on me and said, "Ruckman, you're always reading stuff; let me read you something out of]{.class-0}[ this."]{.class-1}[ I told him, ]{.class-0}["Put that away; it's a lot of baloney."]{.class-1}[ I called that blessed Book pig's meat. That was about two years before I stood in that Catholic rectory before that Priest saying: "What does the Good Book say, Father?"]{.class-0}

[That Priest looked down, and do you know what he read? ]{.class-0}["Seek ye the LORD while he may be found, call ye upon him while he is near: Let the wicked forsake his way, and the unrighteous man his thoughts: and let him return unto the LORD, and he will have mercy upon him; and to our God, for he will abundantly pardon"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 55:6--7).]{.class-0}

I sat down hard into the chair in front of him.

"[What's the trouble, young man?" he asked.]{.class-0}

I said, "Well, I'm in bad trouble."

"[What is it?" he asked again. So I told him everything which I have never told anyone else completely in detail.]{.class-0}

[He said, "You're ]{.class-0}[really]{.class-1}[ in bad trouble."]{.class-0}

"[I know," I said. "What am I gonna do about it?"]{.class-0}

"[You'd better pray and ask God to help you," he said.]{.class-0}

"[Okay, I'll do it," I said. So I got up, went home, knelt down by my bed, and said: "God, help me. Amen." Then I went to sleep. I did that for about ]{.class-0}[two]{.class-1}[ ]{.class-0}[weeks]{.class-1}[. God answered those prayers by busting up my family so I would go down to Pensacola where I ended up meeting Hugh Pyle and getting saved.]{.class-0}

[Back to verse 3: ]{.class-0}["Seek ye the LORD, all ye meek of the earth, which have wrought his judgment; seek righteousness, seek meekness."]{.class-2}[ "Don't you recognize what you're reading there? Why, that's the Sermon on the Mount: ]{.class-0}["Blessed are the meek: for they shall inherit the earth. Blessed are they which do hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled"]{.class-2}[ (Matt. 5:5--6). The Sermon on the Mount is aimed primarily at a Jew just before the Second Coming, just as you read here in Zephaniah. You take these dumb Christians who think the Sermon on the Mount is written to Christians telling them how to get saved---why, the plan of salvation is not even found in Matthew 5--7. It's written to ]{.class-0}[Jews.]{.class-1}

You want more proof? Turn to Psalm 76.

"[In JUDAH is God known: his name is great in ISRAEL"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 76:1)---not the Church.]{.class-0}

"[In SALEM]{.class-2}[ \[that's Jerusalem\]]{.class-0}[ also is his tabernacle, and his dwelling place in ZION"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 76:2)---and that's not the Heavenly Zion or the New Jerusalem either. How do you know that? Psalm 76:3---]{.class-0}["There brake he the arrows of the bow, the shield, and the sword, and the battle. Selah."]{.class-2}[ That's the earthly Jerusalem.]{.class-0}

[Psalm 76:6, ]{.class-0}["At thy rebuke, O God of Jacob\...."]{.class-2}[ See that thing---it's ]{.class-0}[Jacob]{.class-1}[; it's ]{.class-0}[Israel]{.class-1}[; it's not the Church. ]{.class-0}["At thy rebuke, O God of Jacob, both the chariot and the horse are cast into a deep sleep."]{.class-2}[ It's the Battle of Armageddon---Revelation 19:18. ]{.class-0}["He shall cut off the spirit of princes: he is terrible to the kings of the earth"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 76:12).]{.class-0}

[Now look at Psalm 76:8--9. ]{.class-0}["Thou didst cause judgment to be heard from heaven ]{.class-2}[\[Rev. 19:11\]]{.class-0}[; the earth feared and was still, When God arose to judgment, to SAVE ALL THE MEEK OF THE EARTH. Selah."]{.class-2}[ There's Zephaniah 2:3 and the Sermon on the Mount right there in Psalm 76, and the context is the Second Advent and Israel--- NOT New Testament salvation for the Church.]{.class-0}

4 For Gaza shall be forsaken, and Ashkelon a desolation: they shall drive out Ashdod at the noon day, and Ekron shall be rooted up.

5 Woe unto the inhabitants of the sea coast, the nation of the Cherethites! the word of the LORD is against you; O Canaan, the land of the Philistines, I will even destroy thee, that there shall be no inhabitant.

6 And the sea coast shall be dwellings and cottages for shepherds, and folds for flocks.

7 And the coast shall be for the remnant of the house of Judah; they shall feed thereupon: in the houses of Ashkelon shall they lie down in the evening: for the LORD their God shall visit them, and turn away their captivity.

[At the paragraph mark in verse 4, the chapter takes a turn. Zephaniah gets off Israel and gets on the Gentiles. The passage here deals with the Philistines historically. Look at the cities listed in verse 4:]{.class-0}[ "Gaza," "Ashkelon," "Ashdod,"]{.class-2}[ and ]{.class-0}["Ekron.]{.class-2}[ Those are four of the five cities of the Philistines listed in 1 Samuel 6:17; the one that was left out was ]{.class-0}["Gath"]{.class-2}[ where Goliath was from (1 Sam. 17:4). See those ]{.class-0}["Cherethites"]{.class-2}[ in verse 5; those are Philistines who lived in southern Judah (1 Sam. 30:14). They are ]{.class-0}[Hamites]{.class-1}[ (see Gen. 10:14 and the comments in that Commentary).]{.class-0}

[Note the first city listed in verse 4: ]{.class-0}["Gaza."]{.class-2}[ That's the infamous "Gaza Strip" about which you hear so much in the news in regards to Israel and the "Palestinians." By the way, the word ]{.class-0}[Palestine]{.class-1}[ is the Roman word for ]{.class-0}[Philistine.]{.class-1}[ So what you have here is a prophetic reference to what God is going to do with the "Palestinian" Moslems in the "Gaza Strip."]{.class-0}

[When Bush was President, he put pressure on the Israelis to leave their lands, houses, and businesses in Gaza and pull out and let the "Palestinians" have the whole place to themselves. The reasoning was: "If you let us Palestinians have the Gaza Strip, there will be peace" (]{.class-0}[see Hitler and Chamberlain in 1938]{.class-1}[). And of course, when the Moslems got in there, they burned down the churches and synagogues and used the place to launch rockets into Israel. Hillary Clinton gave them something like ]{.class-0}[ninety million dollars]{.class-1}[ when she was Secretary of State to help out all the "poor folks" who got bombed by the Israelis in response for the Moslems bombing Israel.]{.class-0}

[Well, I've got news for Bush, Obama, and Clinton:]{.class-0}[ the Lord God is going to boot every single "Palestinian" out of that land]{.class-1}[ (vss. 4--5) ]{.class-0}[and turn it into a place for keeping sheep]{.class-1}[ (vs. 6). Then He's going to take those Jews and bring them right back in there (vs. 7). God gave that land to Abraham and his descendants through Isaac and Jacob (not Ishmael and Esau), and no "Palestinian," Moslem, or even "Christian" (Roman Catholic, Greek Orthodox, etc.) owns ]{.class-0}[one inch ]{.class-1}[of it. Every one of them is a ]{.class-0}[thief,]{.class-1}[ and any government that backs them is an accessory to the crime.]{.class-0}

[Verse 7: ]{.class-0}["And the coast shall be for the remnant of the house of Judah."]{.class-2}[ Can you imagine bringing up a resolution to the UN: "We move that no one can live in the land of Palestine except Israeli Jews." That would do the job! "Oh, what ]{.class-0}[intolerance!]{.class-1}[ Oh, what ]{.class-0}[bigotry!]{.class-1}[ Oh, what ]{.class-0}[discrimination! ]{.class-1}[Blah, blah, blah, blah."]{.class-0}

"[For the LORD their God shall visit them, and turn away their captivity."]{.class-2}[ The ]{.class-0}["nation not desired"]{.class-2}[ is going to be ]{.class-0}[restored]{.class-1}[, and it's all through the Old Testament, especially in the prophets (see Deut. 30:3; Psa. 85:1, 125:1, 4; Jer. 29:14, 30:3, 10, 18, 31:23, 32:44, 33:7, 11, 26, 46:27; Ezek. 16:53, 39:25; Joel 3:1; Amos 9:14; Zeph. 3:20). Of course, the Catholics and Moslems pretend it isn't there, and even the Jews have given up hope that their Messiah is going to come and complete the restoration begun in 1948 (cf. Isa. 11:11). ]{.class-0}[They've forsaken their own prophets. ]{.class-1}[Now I haven't, and I'm not even a Jew. I believe every word of the prophets.]{.class-0}

[The reality of that contrast became clear to me one time as I was flying somewhere. I was riding first class, and a Jew had sat down beside me. (That was back in the days when my hearing wasn't so bad and I could witness pretty freely.) We were both having dinner there in first class (back in the days when you got steak, potatoes, peas, etc. as part of your first class passage instead of just a little bag of peanuts or pretzels) and arguing about Isaiah 53. That Jew couldn't see Jesus Christ or the blood atonement there at all, and he was telling me that the chapter was about Israel paying for the sins of the Gentiles. As I looked at him, all I could think of was Isaiah 58:14---]{.class-0}["I will cause thee to ride upon the high places of the earth, and feed thee with the heritage of Jacob."]{.class-2}

[That was written to a Jew, and there I was 30,000 feet in the air with this wonderful meal and this guy beside me to whom Isaiah was written. ]{.class-0}[That Bible was his Book]{.class-1}[---it was given by ]{.class-0}[Jews]{.class-1}[ to ]{.class-0}[Jews]{.class-1}[---and it wasn't ]{.class-0}[mine]{.class-1}[. I was just an old, uncircumcised Gentile riding with the Lord in high places eating a fine dinner, and here was this dumb bunny who couldn't see his nose in front of his face when it came to his own Book. Why, if I didn't believe the Bible for any other reason, I'd believe it for that.]{.class-0}

[How come I know more about the Book than the people to whom it was given?]{.class-1}[ Something must have happened to me. I'll tell you what happened: I got born again into the ]{.class-0}[commonwealth of Israel]{.class-1}[ (see Eph. 2:12--13). I was a stranger to the covenants and promises of God, but I'm no stranger anymore. I'm on the inside, and my Jewish friend on that plane was on the outside.]{.class-0}

[Christ said, ]{.class-0}["Many shall come from the east and west, and shall sit down with Abraham, and Isaac, and Jacob, in the kingdom of heaven. But the children of the kingdom shall be cast out into outer darkness"]{.class-2}[ (Matt. 10:11--12). That is what was going on between that Jew and me.]{.class-0}

[But the Apostle Paul said, ]{.class-0}["For I would not, brethren, that ye should be ignorant of this mystery, lest ye should be wise in your own conceits; that blindness in part is happened to Israel, until the fulness of the Gentiles be come in. And so all Israel shall be saved: as it is written, There shall come out of Sion the Deliverer, and shall turn away ungodliness from Jacob; For this is my covenant unto them, when I shall take away their sins"]{.class-2}[ (Rom. 11:25--27).]{.class-0}

Right now, Israel, as a nation, is spiritually blind, just like that Jew on that plane. But when Jesus Christ returns at the Second Advent, He is going to restore them both physically and spiritually.

8 I have heard the reproach of Moab, and the revilings of the children of Ammon, whereby they have reproached my people, and magnified themselves against their border.

9 Therefore as I live, saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, Surely Moab shall be as Sodom, and the children of Ammon as Gomorrah, even the breeding of nettles, and saltpits, and a perpetual desolation: the residue of my people shall spoil them, and the remnant of my people shall possess them.

10 This shall they have for their pride, because they have reproached and magnified themselves against the people of the LORD of hosts.

11 The LORD will be terrible unto them: for he will famish all the gods of the earth; and men shall worship him, every one from his place, even all the isles of the heathen.

[The passage here deals with Moab and Ammon, the nations that come from the two bastard sons of Lot through incest with his own daughters. But notice that four of the Gentile nations mentioned in this chapter (the Philistines, the Moabites, the Ammonites, and the Ethiopians \[vs. 12\]) are ]{.class-0}[Africans from Ham.]{.class-1}[ Here, Moab and Ammon came from Lot's two daughters who had an ]{.class-0}[Egyptian mother]{.class-1}[ (and if not an Egyptian mother, then a Sodomite mother \[see comments on Gen. 11:31 in that Commentary\]; either way, the mother of Lot's daughters was ]{.class-0}[Hamitic]{.class-1}[ \[see Gen. 11:6, 15--19\]). That's what Ishmael had---]{.class-0}[an Egyptian mother]{.class-1}[ (Gen. 16:3, 11). Esau marries into the line of ]{.class-0}[Ishmael]{.class-1}[, as well as Canaan, and so Edom has an African heritage as well. Today, the territory of Ishmael (Arabia) and Moab, Ammon, and Edom (Jordan) is ]{.class-0}[100% Moslem;]{.class-1}[ and Ethiopia is going that way. So the judgments pronounced against the Gentiles in Zephaniah 2 are judgments against the "Islamic Nation."]{.class-0}

[All those nations are competitors with the Jews and Christians both historically and religiously. The Moslems claim to believe in Jesus as a prophet. Do you know how ]{.class-0}[Jesus]{.class-1}[ is spelled in the ]{.class-0}[Koran]{.class-1}[? Of course not; who cares about that kind of stuff? In Greek, that name is ]{.class-0}[Iesous]{.class-1}[, which is transliterated ]{.class-0}[Jesus]{.class-1}[ in English. But in the ]{.class-0}[Koran,]{.class-1}[ the name is ]{.class-0}["Isa."]{.class-1}[ That's not the Arabic transliteration or translation of ]{.class-0}[Iesous]{.class-1}[; that's the ]{.class-0}[Arabic]{.class-1}[ word for ]{.class-0}[Esau.]{.class-1}[ The "Christ" in which a Moslem professes to believe isn't Jesus at all; it's ]{.class-0}[Esau.]{.class-1}

[Moreover, the "Jesus" of the ]{.class-0}[Koran]{.class-1}[ doesn't exist. Wasn't your Saviour born in a manger in Bethlehem? Not the Moslem "Isa"; ]{.class-0}[he was born under a palm tree. ]{.class-1}[Didn't your Saviour die on a Roman cross for your sins and then rise again and ascend to Heaven forty days later under His own power? Do you know what happened to the Moslem "Isa"? Of course not. (Why would you look that up when you could watch the World Series or keep track of the stock market?) Well, it all depends on which group of Mohammedans you ask. The Sunnis say one thing, and the Shiites say something else. One bunch has him being raptured ]{.class-0}[with his mother Mary]{.class-1}[ (a good Roman Catholic doctrine), and the other bunch has him living to be 120 years old and then ]{.class-0}[dying in Kashmir, India]{.class-1}[.]{.class-0}[ But none of them believe He died on the cross, and He certainly didn't die for anyone's sins. ]{.class-1}[That's not some "extremists" or "fanatics" like Bin Laden and Al Qaeda; that's exactly what ]{.class-0}[900 million Moslems]{.class-1}[ on this earth believe. In the ]{.class-0}[Koran, God has no Son.]{.class-1}[ (Get the work on ]{.class-0}[Will the Real Allah Please Stand Up?]{.class-1}[ for all the documentation.)]{.class-0}

[Listen, people, that Bible says: ]{.class-0}["Neither is there salvation in any other: for there is NONE OTHER NAME under heaven given among men, whereby we must be saved"]{.class-2}[ (Acts 4:12). You couldn't be saved reading a ]{.class-0}[Koran]{.class-1}[ no matter what you did with it. The name isn't even the right name, and the ]{.class-0}[person]{.class-1}[ isn't the Jesus of the Bible. "Isa" is ]{.class-0}["another Jesus"]{.class-2}[ (2 Cor. 11:4), and anybody who believes in that "Jesus" is]{.class-0}[ cursed of God]{.class-1}[ (Gal. 1:8--9).]{.class-0}

[Now those are your Philistines, Moabites, and Ammonites being prophesied about here. Today they're called "Palestinians," "Jordanians," and "Arabians."]{.class-0}[ They all follow the same religion, and it's 100% anti-Semitic.]{.class-1}

[Notice the expression ]{.class-0}["my people"]{.class-2}[ in verses 8--9. He's talking about the ]{.class-0}[Jews]{.class-1}[; ]{.class-0}[there's not a Christian in the lot.]{.class-1}[ You couldn't find a Christian there with a flashlight. ]{.class-0}["My people"]{.class-2}[ are circumcised, bearded, Temple-worshipping, Sabbath-observing ]{.class-0}[Jews.]{.class-1}[ The only way to make them Christians is to pretend that the Jews are no longer God's people and that He is through with them permanently. That's exactly what America and the United Nations are doing right now. They are going full force against everything in that Book from cover to cover in a vain attempt to get rid of it. But God is going to turn that Jew's captivity, and the United States and the United Nations are going to be ]{.class-0}[bound]{.class-1}[ and ]{.class-0}[burned]{.class-1}[ (3:8).]{.class-0}

[Verse 8:]{.class-0}[ "they have\...magnified themselves against their border."]{.class-2}[ In 1921, "Winnie the Pooh" Churchill created Transjordan (called "Jordan" today) and cut the border back to the Jordan River, taking away all the land belonging to Reuben, Gad, and the half tribe of Manasseh and giving it to ]{.class-0}[Mohammed. So God sent in the Japs and took away Malay, Singapore, and Borneo from the British Empire. Then He sent Mahatma Gandhi and took away India. Then He sent in the Communists down in South Africa and took away Rhodesia. Churchill ended up losing the whole British Empire.]{.class-1}[ The Lord promised Abraham: ]{.class-0}["I will bless them that bless thee, and curse him that curseth thee."]{.class-2}[ That promise has nothing to do with Ishmael, Esau, or any Moslem or "Palestinian" at all (see Num. 24:9). If God did that to the nation He used to produce the ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ Bible, what do you think He's going to do to ]{.class-0}[America]{.class-1}[ for cutting that Jew out of the Gaza Strip and the West Bank under Bush?]{.class-0}

[In that Bible, Israel not only gets everything Moses and Joshua conquered in Numbers and Joshua, they get everything from the ]{.class-0}[Nile River Delta]{.class-1}[ to the ]{.class-0}[Euphrates River]{.class-1}[ (Gen. 15:18). That is why the Scriptures say David ]{.class-0}["went to recover his border at the river Euphrates"]{.class-2}[ (2 Sam. 8:3), even though Israel never possessed any of that land anywhere in Genesis through 1 Samuel. He claimed the promise the Lord made to Abraham and took it seriously. In the Millennium, Israel not only gets Palestine, ]{.class-0}[it gets northern Egypt, Sinai, Syria, Jordan, and half of Iraq.]{.class-1}

[Verse 9: ]{.class-0}["Surely Moab shall be as Sodom, and the children of Ammon as Gomorrah."]{.class-2}[ The Lord's going to burn Moab and Ammon just like He burned Sodom and Gomorrah. The New Testament says those two cities are ]{.class-0}["suffering the vengeance of eternal fire"]{.class-2}[ (Jude 7): they're burning right now. So when Jesus Christ goes through Moab and Ammon at the Second Advent, He burns them up just like He does Edom (see the comments on Hab. 3:3).]{.class-0}

"[Even the breeding of nettles, and salt pits, and a perpetual desolation]{.class-2}[ \[like the region around the Dead Sea\]]{.class-0}[: the residue of my people shall spoil them, and the remnant of my people shall possess them."]{.class-2}[ The Jews will get everything those Jordanians have, and any of them who are left after the Lord goes through there will serve those Jews. Psalm 2:12 and 72:9 say that they will kiss Christ's feet or be destroyed.]{.class-0}

"[This shall they have for their pride, because they have reproached and magnified themselves against the people of the LORD of hosts"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 10). The Scriptural commentary on this passage can be read in Jeremiah 48 and Isaiah 16 (note Jer. 48:29 and Isa. 16:6).]{.class-0}

"[The LORD will be terrible unto them"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 11). No mercy; no forgiveness---that's the Second Advent. ]{.class-0}["For he will famish all the gods of the earth"]{.class-2}[; that is, He'll starve them out just like they starved out His people (Rev. 13:16--17). ]{.class-0}["And men shall worship him, every one from his place, even all the isles of the heathen."]{.class-2}[ That's the whole world (see Mal. 1:11; Isa. 60:11--14, 2:2--3; Zech. 14:16; etc.).]{.class-0}

12 Ye Ethiopians also, ye shall be slain by my sword.

13 And he will stretch out his hand against the north, and destroy Assyria; and will make Nineveh a desolation, and dry like a wilderness.

14 And flocks shall lie down in the midst of her, all the beasts of the nations: both the cormorant and the bittern shall lodge in the upper lintels of it; their voice shall sing in the windows; desolation shall be in the thresholds: for he shall uncover the cedar work.

15 This is the rejoicing city that dwelt carelessly, that said in her heart, I am, and there is none beside me: how is she become a desolation, a place for beasts to lie down in! every one that passeth by her shall hiss, and wag his hand.

[Another group of Hamites shows up in verse 12: ]{.class-0}["Ethiopians"]{.class-2}[ (from Cush in Gen. 10:6). Under Haile Selassie, the country had great freedom for Christians and Jewish proselytes, but today the country is headed toward being 100% Moslem. ]{.class-0}["Ye shall be slain by my sword"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 12). That ]{.class-0}["sword"]{.class-2}[ in Revelation 19:15 goes ]{.class-0}["out of his mouth"]{.class-2}[; it's the word of God (Heb. 4:12).]{.class-0}

[Note the connection of Assyria and Nineveh in verse 13 to the Ethiopians in verse 12 (see the comments on Nah. 3:9 in Vol. I of this Commentary). Although Nineveh was founded by a Shemite (Gen. 10:11, 22), it was characterized by the idolatry of Nimrod (Isa. 23:13), the son of Cush the Ethiopian (Gen. 10:8). The original ]{.class-0}["Assyrian"]{.class-2}[ was a picture of ]{.class-0}["the Assyrian"]{.class-2}[ that will be here when Jesus Christ returns (Mic. 5:5).]{.class-0}

"[And he will stretch out his hand against the north"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 13). That would be Assyria, which today is northern Iraq which is]{.class-0}[ 100% Moslem,]{.class-1}[ Syria which is ]{.class-0}[100% Moslem,]{.class-1}[ Lebanon which now is]{.class-0}[ 100% Moslem]{.class-1}[, and Turkey which is ]{.class-0}[100% Moslem]{.class-1}[. All the judgments from verses 4--15 are against Mohammed's and the ]{.class-0}[Koran's]{.class-1}[ "Islamic Nation." (For further comments on vs. 13, we refer you to the commentary on Nahum in Vol. I of this Commentary.)]{.class-0}

[Verses 14--15 are still a reference to Nineveh, the capital city of Assyria in verse 13. It becomes a desolate place of unclean birds (]{.class-0}["the cormorant and the bittern"]{.class-2}[---see Lev. 11:17) and beasts. Notice how closely the description matches the description of Babylon when it is judged.]{.class-0}

"[And Babylon, the glory of kingdoms, the beauty of the Chaldees' excellency, shall be as when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah. It shall never be inhabited, neither shall it be dwelt in from generation to generation\...But wild beasts of the desert shall lie there; and their houses shall be full of doleful creatures; and owls shall dwell there"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 13:19--21).]{.class-0}

[Isaiah 14:23 says, ]{.class-0}["I will also make it a possession for the bittern."]{.class-2}[ Isaiah 34:11 clearly shows you (from the context) that these unclean birds and ]{.class-0}["doleful creatures"]{.class-2}[ are not the ]{.class-0}[physical creatures, ]{.class-1}[but references to ]{.class-0}[unclean spirits]{.class-1}[ (cf. Mark 4:4, 15). Both Babylon and Nineveh are pictures of ]{.class-0}["Babylon the great," "the habitation of devils, and the hold of every foul spirit, and a cage of every unclean and hateful bird"]{.class-2}[ (Rev. 18:2). Compare what Nineveh says in verse 15 with what Babylon the Great says in Revelation 18:7. Notice also in verse 15 that the fall of Babylon the Great gets the same kind of reaction as the fall of Jerusalem in Lamentation 2:15 (see also Nah. 3:19).]{.class-0}

[]{#section-0_1_4c7e061c9562e1c_b688.xhtml}

CHAPTER THREE

3:1 Woe to her that is filthy and polluted, to the oppressing city!

2 She obeyed not the voice; she received not correction; she trusted not in the LORD; she drew not near to her God.

3 Her princes within her are roaring lions; her judges are evening wolves; they gnaw not the bones till the morrow.

4 Her prophets are light and treacherous persons: her priests have polluted the sanctuary, they have done violence to the law.

"[Woe to her that is filthy and polluted, to the oppressing city"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 1). Now this could be a reference to Nineveh back in 2:13--15, but notice verses 2 and 5: ]{.class-0}["her God"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 2) and ]{.class-0}["The just LORD is in the midst thereof"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 5). Jehovah wasn't the ]{.class-0}["God"]{.class-2}[ of Nineveh, and He wasn't]{.class-0}[ "in the midst thereof."]{.class-2}[ He didn't have a ]{.class-0}["sanctuary"]{.class-2}[ there either (vs. 4). The reference is undoubtedly to Jerusalem since it certainly was a ]{.class-0}["filthy\...city"]{.class-2}[ (Lam. 1:9; Ezek. 16:36) and an ]{.class-0}["oppressing city"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 5:7, 30:12, 52:13; Jer. 6:6; Ezek. 22:29). In fact, the passage here should be compared with what Ezekiel said about Jerusalem in Ezekiel 22:25--29.]{.class-0}

"[Woe to her that is filthy and polluted."]{.class-2}[ That's not talking about garbage and air pollution and the like; it's talking about moral filth and pollution (cf. vs. 4). (Someone put out a bumper sticker one time that read: "Stop air pollution; shut your filthy mouth.") In the Tribulation, Jerusalem ]{.class-0}["spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt"]{.class-2}[ (Rev. 11:8) because the same filthy things will be going on in that city as went on in those two places.]{.class-0}

[Now, we understand that these verses apply ]{.class-0}[historically]{.class-1}[ and ]{.class-0}[doctrinally]{.class-1}[ to Jerusalem before the invasion of Nebuchadnezzar and during the Tribulation under the Antichrist, but as we go through this passage, we are going to make ]{.class-0}[spiritual application ]{.class-1}[to the United States. After all, if you are going to claim that America is a Christian nation because of her Biblical roots (and they certainly are there), and try to claim the promises of blessing and revival made to Israel in the Old Testament (see how any Fundamentalist, Conservative, or Evangelical handles 2 Chron. 7:14), then don't try to "pass the buck" when you come to verses like you find here. After all, if God judged ]{.class-0}[His own chosen people]{.class-1}[ for their sins, do you honestly think "Christian America" is going to get away "scott free"?]{.class-0}

"[Woe to her that is filthy and polluted."]{.class-2}[ It's a filthy city like New York, Las Vegas, Chicago, Houston, New Orleans, Washington, D.C., and a dozen others just like it in the United States.]{.class-0}

"[She obeyed not the voice; she received not correction; she trusted not in the LORD; she drew not near to her God"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 2). Thank you Mr. President (Obama, Clinton, Bush); thank you Senators and Congressmen (any of them from either party); thank you Supreme Court judges. You didn't ]{.class-0}[turn to the Lord, ]{.class-1}[you didn't ]{.class-0}[receive correction]{.class-1}[, and you did]{.class-0}[ not]{.class-1}[ draw near to God. You got just as far from Him as you could get, and then you ran Him out. You led and the whole country followed you.]{.class-0}

"[Her princes within her are roaring lions; her judges are evening wolves"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 3)---pictures of the Devil (1 Pet. 5:8) and false prophets (Matt. 7:15). It's the ]{.class-0}[leaders]{.class-1}[ of the country who are leading it into moral decline.]{.class-0}

"[Her judges are evening wolves."]{.class-2}[ When the Congress can't pass laws to corrupt the country, the Supreme Court judges and the district court judges step in and "legislate from the bench." In 1962, they threw ]{.class-0}[prayer]{.class-1}[ out of the public schools, and in 1963, they threw the ]{.class-0}[Bible]{.class-1}[ out. In 1973, they legalized ]{.class-0}[abortion]{.class-1}[ through the entire pregnancy (including the delivery)]{.class-0}[ without one Senator or Congressman voting on anything.]{.class-1}[ In 1987, the "nine old men" ruled that only one theory of origins (evolution) can be taught in the public schools, although that is exactly what the ACLU argued ]{.class-0}[against]{.class-1}[ in 1926 at the "Scopes Monkey Trials." And if the religious liberty of any Bible-believing Christian is violated by the State, all the Supreme Court has to do is ]{.class-0}[refuse to listen to the case,]{.class-1}[ as they did in the cases of Roloff in Texas (1980), Silevan in Nebraska (1981), and Dixon in Indianapolis (2001). That's your nine Supreme Court judges. Six of them are professing Christians, but they are ]{.class-0}[Catholics,]{.class-1}[ not "Christians."]{.class-0}

"[They gnaw not the bones till the morrow."]{.class-2}[ In other words, they divide the spoil and eat it immediately and don't leave anything for the next day. So what you have in America right now is the Democratic President and Congress spending the nation into a hole out of which your children, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren won't be able to dig themselves. The idea is to buy voters off ]{.class-0}[now]{.class-1}[ so they can stay in power ]{.class-0}[now.]{.class-1}

"[Her PROPHETS are light and treacherous persons: her PRIESTS have polluted the sanctuary, they have done violence to the law"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 4). Now there's the problem with the nation: it's the ]{.class-0}[preachers.]{.class-1}[ Who's that? Oh, it's people like Rick Warren, Joel Osteen, and Robert Schuller.]{.class-0}

"[Oh, there you go again, Ruckman, calling people names!" Shut up for a while, and maybe you'll learn something. The Apostle Paul, writing under the inspiration of the Holy Spirit of God, calls a certain race of people ]{.class-0}["liars, evil beasts, slow bellies"]{.class-2}[ (see the comments on Tit. 1:12 in the ]{.class-0}[Bible Believer's Commentary on the Pastoral Epistles]{.class-1}[). Do you know what Jesus Christ said when someone told Him Herod was out to get Him (Luke 13:31)? He said, ]{.class-0}["Go ye, and tell that fox"]{.class-2}[ (Luke 13:32). He called a ruler of His day "a name": He called him a ]{.class-0}["fox."]{.class-2}[ So we won't hesitate to call names and call those people what they really are. (I think it was Sam Jones who called the Mayor of a certain city a "hog-jowled liquorhead.")]{.class-0}

[Do you know what your Saviour called the leading Rabbis of His day? He called them: ]{.class-0}["ye serpents, ye generation of vipers"]{.class-2}[ (Matt. 23:33). Is that a nice way to talk about a ]{.class-0}[religious leader?]{.class-1}[ Well, He also called them blind, foolish hypocrites (Matt. 23:13--19, 23:25), and He said they were children of Hell (Matt. 23:15) whose ]{.class-0}[father]{.class-1}[ was the Devil (John 8:44).]{.class-0}

Now if you want to know what the Lord thinks of the prophets and priests in verse 4, turn over to Jeremiah 23.

"[Mine heart within me is broken because of the prophets ]{.class-2}[\[the problem is the ]{.class-0}[preachers]{.class-1}[\]]{.class-0}[: all my bones shake; I am like a drunken man, and like a man whom wine hath overcome, because of the LORD, and because of the W-O-R-D-S of his holiness"]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 23:9).]{.class-0}

"[For both prophet and priest are profane; yea, in my house have I found their wickedness, saith the LORD\....I have seen folly in the prophets of Samaria; they prophesied in Baal, and caused my people Israel to err. "[\...and walk in lies]{.class-2}[ \[like "the original autographs say\..." and "THE Greek text says\..." and "only the originals are inspired" and "no translation is inspired," etc.\]]{.class-0}[: they strengthen also the hands of evildoers, that none doth return from his wickedness: they are all of them unto me as Sodom, and the inhabitants thereof as Gomorrah"]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 23:4).]{.class-0}

[Recently, some woman who professed to be a Christian and who was a "popular Christian music artist" confessed to being a dyke and committing fornication with another woman the whole time she was "performing" for a bunch of stupid Christians. Oh, she got it out of an ]{.class-0}[NIV]{.class-1}[ that removed the word ]{.class-0}["sodomite"]{.class-2}[ because of a Lesbian (Virginia Mollenkot) and a faggot (Martin Woulstra) on the translation committee; they recommended the change based on the "original languages" in order to justify their sin.
