"[Therefore thus saith the LORD of hosts concerning the prophets; Behold, I will feed them with wormwood, and make them drink the water of gall: for from the prophets of Jerusalem is profaneness gone forth into all the land. Thus saith the LORD of hosts, Hearken not unto the words of the prophets that prophesy unto you: they make you vain\..."]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 25:15--16).]{.class-0}

These preachers stand up and tell you how wonderful you are and "smile, God loves you" and "you can have your best life now" and "something good is going to happen to you today." When they start that mess, you are to plug your ears, and tell them to shut their mouth and get out of the pulpit.

"[\...they speak a vision of their own heart ]{.class-2}[\[what they are preaching, they didn't get from God or the Bible; they got it from their own imaginations\]]{.class-0}[, and not out of the mouth of the LORD"]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 23:16). Preachers can no longer say ]{.class-0}["Thus saith the LORD"]{.class-2}[ because they have changed what the Lord said so much until they no longer know what He said.]{.class-0}

"[They say still unto them that despise me, The LORD hath said, Ye shall have peace\..."]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 23:17). "Islam is a religion of peace," "Peace be unto you," "Lord, make me an instrument of Thy peace," "Pray for world peace." "[I have not sent these prophets, yet they ran: I have not spoken to them, yet they prophesied. But if they had stood in my counsel, and had caused my people to hear my WORDS ]{.class-2}[\[and I don't mean "principles" or "fundamentals"\]]{.class-0}[, then they should have turned them from their evil way, and from the evil of their doings]{.class-2}[ \[the people in America would have gotten right if the preachers had preached His words, but they didn't\]]{.class-0}[\...I have heard what the prophets said, that prophesy lies in my name, saying, I have dreamed, I have dreamed ]{.class-2}[\[Why, hello, Martin Luther King Jr.; what are you doing here?\]]{.class-0}[. How long shall this be in the heart of the prophets that prophesy lies? yea, they are prophets of the deceit of their own heart; Which think to cause my people to forget my name ]{.class-2}[\[and we are making application here to Christians forgetting the name of their Lord and Saviour\]]{.class-0}[ by their dreams ]{.class-2}[\[they're ]{.class-0}[nightmares]{.class-1}[\]]{.class-0}[\...The prophet that hath a dream, let him tell a dream ]{.class-2}[\[freedom of speech: let the Moslems, Black Panthers, Mormons, Jehovah's Witnesses, etc., have their say; but let us have ours too\]]{.class-0}[; and he that hath my word, let him speak my word faithfully ]{.class-2}[\[get out there on the street corner and preach it\]]{.class-0}[. What is the chaff ]{.class-2}[\[the false stuff\]]{.class-0}[ to the wheat ]{.class-2}[\[the real stuff\]]{.class-0}[? saith the LORD. Is not my word like as a fire ]{.class-2}[\[it'll burn you\]]{.class-0}[? saith the LORD; and like a hammer that breaketh the rock in pieces]{.class-2}[ \[it isn't all just given to make you feel good; it's given to beat you into shape\]]{.class-0}[? Therefore, behold, I am against the prophets, saith the LORD, that steal my W-O-R-D-S every one from his neighbour\..."]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 23:21--30).]{.class-0}

[God gave them a Book that said: ]{.class-0}["Abstain from ALL APPEARANCE of evil"]{.class-2}[ (1 Thess. 5:22). They took it out and just had you abstaining from ]{.class-0}[all kinds]{.class-1}[ of evil.]{.class-0}

[God told them to ]{.class-0}["STUDY to shew thyself approved unto God, a workman that needeth not to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"]{.class-2}[ (2 Tim. 2:15). [The Book says, ]{.class-0}["on earth peace, good will toward men"]{.class-2}[ (Luke 2:14). They changed it to ]{.class-0}["peace on earth to men of good will."]{.class-1}[ They are liars and thieves; they stole God's words from you.]{.class-0}

[The new "Bibles" got rid of God's ]{.class-0}["child"]{.class-2}[ and made Him a ]{.class-0}["servant"]{.class-1}[ in Acts 4:27, 30. They stole the ]{.class-0}["infallible proofs"]{.class-2}[ of the resurrection from Acts 1:3 and left you with just ]{.class-0}["many proofs."]{.class-1}[ They're thieves: STOP THIEF!]{.class-0}

[Now what's the problem? Jeremiah 23:36---]{.class-0}["ye have perverted the W-O-R-D-S of the living God."]{.class-2}[ And I don't mean the fundamentals. Every Catholic in the world believes in the fundamentals; they just don't give a flip about ]{.class-0}[what God said]{.class-1}[. The problem throughout Jeremiah 23 is those WORDS.]{.class-0}

5 The just LORD is in the midst thereof; he will not do iniquity: every morning doth he bring his judgment to light, he faileth not; but the unjust knoweth no shame.

6 I have cut off the nations: their towers are desolate; I made their streets waste, that none passeth by: their cities are destroyed, so that there is no man, that there is none inhabitant.

7 I said, Surely thou wilt fear me, thou wilt receive instruction; so their dwelling should not be cut off, howsoever I punished them: but they rose early, and corrupted all their doings.

"[The just LORD is in the midst thereof"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 5). Well, the Lord is not ]{.class-0}["in the midst"]{.class-2}[ of Jerusalem as you find it in verses 15 and 17 of this chapter or in Zechariah 2:10--11; that is, in the sense of blessing and approval. In this verse, He is there in the sense of observing and judging their sins (see Gen. 11:5--7).]{.class-0}

"[He will not do iniquity."]{.class-2}[ In Job 8:3, the question is put to Job: ]{.class-0}["Doth God pervert judgment? or doth the Almighty pervert justice?"]{.class-2}[ The answer is found in Job 34:10, 12---]{.class-0}["far be it from God, that he should do wickedness; and from the Almighty, that he should commit iniquity\....Yea, surely God will not do wickedly, neither will the Almighty pervert judgment."]{.class-2}[ Abraham asked, ]{.class-0}["Shall not the Judge of all the earth do right?"]{.class-2}[ (Gen. 18:25). The answer is: "Yes, He will."]{.class-0}

[Now, a Jew will ]{.class-0}["do iniquity"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 1:4; Ezek. 9:9); the heathen will ]{.class-0}["do iniquity"]{.class-2}[ (Jer. 25:12); as Christians, you and I can ]{.class-0}["do iniquity"]{.class-2}[ (Rom. 6:19 cf. 2 Tim. 2:19); but God Almighty will never ]{.class-0}["do iniquity" ]{.class-2}[(Deut. 32:4; 2 Chron. 19:7). Whatever God ]{.class-0}[does]{.class-1}[ (or ]{.class-0}[allows]{.class-1}[), it is ]{.class-0}[right.]{.class-1}[ Our problem is that we don't see the "big picture" like the Lord does. Sometimes it's obvious why He does a thing (as it is here), and other times it isn't. Job had no idea why all the bad things in Job 1--2 happened to him until God Himself revealed it at the end of the book.]{.class-0}

"[Every morning doth he bring his judgment to light, he faileth not."]{.class-2}[ The Lord told Judah what He was going to do to them if they didn't repent, and He told them more than once. He sent ]{.class-0}[Isaiah]{.class-1}[ to tell them; He sent ]{.class-0}[Jeremiah]{.class-1}[ and ]{.class-0}[Ezekiel]{.class-1}[ to tell them; He sent ]{.class-0}[Habakkuk]{.class-1}[ and ]{.class-0}[Zephaniah]{.class-1}[ to tell them. ]{.class-0}[They had no excuse.]{.class-1}[ And when the Lord sends His judgment on the United States, they won't have any excuse either. There are still some Bible-believing preachers around telling folks the truth. You can still get ahold of a ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ Bible here in America and read it; it hasn't disappeared here yet.]{.class-0}[ Americans will have no excuse when the ax falls.]{.class-1}

"[But the unjust knoweth no shame."]{.class-2}[ The Lord said in Jeremiah 3:3, ]{.class-0}["thou refusedst to be ashamed."]{.class-2}[ It's not just that they know no shame; they ]{.class-0}[refused]{.class-1}[ to be ashamed when they ]{.class-0}[did]{.class-1}[ know it. That's the problem with modern Americans: they can't blush; they are never ashamed of themselves. You've got kids eleven, twelve, and thirteen years old killing their parents (or someone else), and it doesn't bother them at all. I know; I've preached to them in prisons made for teenagers who commit more than three felonies before they're fifteen. People don't blush when they hear filthy lyrics over the radio or when they see some half-dressed woman on the television. They don't blush when they go by the pornographic magazines on the magazine rack.]{.class-0}

[I have traveled up and down this country for over sixty years now, 40,000 miles a year for more than 55 years. One of the things I've noticed, as I've been in and out of the airports, is that when I went by those magazine racks, I would see grown men there thumbing through ]{.class-0}[Playboy, Penthouse, Gent, Hustler,]{.class-1}[ and all that stuff who did not even blush looking at those pictures. They acted as if they were just perfectly normal. I guess it is because they don't have any ]{.class-0}[red blood]{.class-1}[ in them.]{.class-0}

[Verses 6-7 are God judging the Gentile nations in an effort to get Israel to do right so He won't have to judge her. ]{.class-0}["I have cut off the nations \[]{.class-2}[there's the Gentiles\]\...]{.class-0}[I said, Surely thou wilt fear me\...." ]{.class-2}[Who's the ]{.class-0}["thou"]{.class-2}[ in verse 7? It's Judah. The Lord's saying, "If I do all those things to the heathen, my people are going to look at that and get scared and straighten up." ]{.class-0}[But they didn't.]{.class-1}

"[I have cut off the nations" ]{.class-2}[(vs. 6). He's speaking ]{.class-0}[prophetically]{.class-1}[ to the United Nations in the Tribulation. ]{.class-0}["Their towers are desolate\...their cities are destroyed" ]{.class-2}[(see the comments on 1:16). ]{.class-0}["So that there is no man, that there is none inhabitant"]{.class-2}[ (see the comments on 1:2--3).]{.class-0}

"[I said, Surely thou wilt fear me, thou wilt receive instruction" ]{.class-2}[(vs. 7). When it comes to America, the Lord has been trying to show this country something for over sixty years now. He let the greatest nation in the world lose ]{.class-0}[two wars ]{.class-1}[against countries ]{.class-0}[no bigger than Colorado,]{.class-1}[ and the people in this nation didn't learn anything. He took away their gold, and they didn't learn ]{.class-0}[anything]{.class-1}[. He gave them a skyrocketing VD and divorce rate, and they didn't learn ]{.class-0}[anything]{.class-1}[, He let women take the jobs and power away from the men, and they didn't learn ]{.class-0}[anything]{.class-1}[. He got them embroiled in two more wars which they are currently losing (Iraq and Afghanistan), and they still don't ]{.class-0}[receive instruction.]{.class-1}[ ]{.class-0}["Howsoever I punished them: but they rose early, and corrupted all their doings."]{.class-2}

8 Therefore wait ye upon me, saith the LORD, until the day that I rise up to the prey: for my determination is to gather the nations, that I may assemble the kingdoms, to pour upon them mine indignation, even all my fierce anger: for all the earth shall be devoured with the fire of my jealousy.

[We have reached the most important verse in the book of Zephaniah. It is what I call one of the "salient" verses of the Bible; that is, a verse that is ]{.class-0}[absolutely essential ]{.class-1}[to understanding and interpreting the Scriptures. The verse is addressed to ]{.class-0}["the nations"---]{.class-2}[all the Gentile kingdoms of the world. That]{.class-1}[ is the group to whom Jeremiah was called to preach before he was ever born (Jer. 1:5).]{.class-0}

[The verse tells you that the Lord is determined to get all the nations together in a ]{.class-0}[United Nations Assembly]{.class-1}[ (note the wording: ]{.class-0}["nations" ]{.class-2}[and ]{.class-0}["assemble"]{.class-2}[) for the express purpose of]{.class-0}[ burning them all up ]{.class-1}[in one shot. Isaiah 43:9 says, ]{.class-0}["Let all the nations be gathered together, and let the people be assembled." ]{.class-2}[Why? ]{.class-0}["To sift the nations with the sieve of vanity: and there shall be a bridle in the jaws of the people, causing them to err" (]{.class-2}[Isa. 30:28). That ]{.class-0}["bridle"]{.class-2}[ is a hook through the jaw (see Ezek. 29:4, 38:4) which forces the nations to go where God wants them to go, whether they want to or not. God drives hooks through the jaw of the nations and draws them together in one bunch, and He says:]{.class-0}[ "his lips are full of indignation, and his tongue as a devouring fire: And his breath, as an overflowing stream, shall reach to the midst of the neck" ]{.class-2}[(Isa. 30:27--28, cf. comments on Hab. 3:13). Jesus Christ said, ]{.class-0}["Gather ye together first the tares, and bind them in bundles to burn them"]{.class-2}[ (Matt. 13:30).]{.class-0}

[That's God warning the United Nations of what's coming over 2,600 years before they decided to meet in downtown New York. You can find it over and over again in the prophets (Isa. 8:9--10, 54:15; Jer. 25:30--31; Joel 3:11--12; Mic. 4:11--13, 5:8--15; Zech. 12:3--6, 14:1--3, 12--15, etc.). The UN will ignore the warning ]{.class-0}[just like the depraved sinners of Noah's day did]{.class-1}[ (see Gen. 5:21 and comments in that Commentary, and Gen. 6:3 cf. 2 Pet. 2:5).]{.class-0}

[Listen, folks, that Bible says: ]{.class-0}["the nations are as a drop of a bucket, and are counted as the small dust of the balance"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 40:15). All 191 Gentile nations in the UN are like a single drop of water in an empty bucket; they are like dust on a scale---they don't weigh enough to make a difference. That is how impressive the combined might of the United States, Canada, Australia, England, the European Union, Russia, China, etc., are to God. He says, ]{.class-0}["All nations before him are as NOTHING; and they are counted to him LESS THAN NOTHING"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 40:17). They don't even come up to a zero; they are in the ]{.class-0}[minus]{.class-1}[ numbers. The Lord says they aren't even worth burning up (Isa. 40:16), but He ]{.class-0}[will]{.class-1}[ (2 Thess. 1:7--8).]{.class-0}

9 For then will I turn to the people a pure language, that they may all call upon the name of the LORD, to serve him with one consent.

10 From beyond the rivers of Ethiopia my suppliants, even the daughter of my dispersed, shall bring mine offering.

11 In that day shalt thou not be ashamed for all thy doings, wherein thou hast transgressed against me: for then I will take away out of the midst of thee them that rejoice in thy pride, and thou shalt no more be haughty because of my holy mountain.

12 I will also leave in the midst of thee an afflicted and poor people, and they shall trust in the name of the LORD.

13 The remnant of Israel shall not do iniquity, nor speak lies; neither shall a deceitful tongue be found in their mouth: for they shall feed and lie down, and none shall make them afraid.

14 Sing, O daughter of Zion; shout, O Israel; be glad and rejoice with all the heart, O daughter of Jerusalem.

15 The LORD hath taken away thy judgments, he hath cast out thine enemy: the king of Israel, even the LORD, is in the midst of thee: thou shalt not see evil any more.

16 In that day it shall be said to Jerusalem, Fear thou not: and to Zion, Let not thine hands be slack.

17 The LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty; he will save, he will rejoice over thee with joy; he will rest in his love, he will joy over thee with singing.

18 I will gather them that are sorrowful for the solemn assembly, who are of thee, to whom the reproach of it was a burden.

19 Behold, at that time I will undo all that afflict thee: and I will save her that halteth, and gather her that was driven out; and I will get them praise and fame in every land where they have been put to shame.

20 At that time will I bring you again, even in the time that I gather you: for I will make you a name and a praise among all people of the earth, when I turn back your captivity before your eyes, saith the LORD.

[Now up to this point in Zephaniah, it has just been unsheeted Hell from start to finish; there has been nothing but negative, negative, negative since chapter 1. But here, starting with verse 9 through the end of the chapter, we are finally on a positive "kick." Of course, it's not as bad as Habakkuk, where you get nothing positive until the ]{.class-0}[last two verses]{.class-1}[ of the book. The passage before us deals with the restoration of Israel.]{.class-0}

"[For then will I turn to the people a pure language"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 9). ]{.class-0}["The people," ]{.class-2}[there, are what's left of ]{.class-0}["the nations"]{.class-2}[ in verse 8. ]{.class-0}[After]{.class-1}[ the Lord wipes out 200 million UN troops at Armageddon (Rev. 9:16, 16:12--16, 19:19--21), He gathers what's left of the Gentile peoples to the Judgment of the Nations about which you read in Matthew 25:31--46. The ones who pass that judgment are ]{.class-0}["the people"]{.class-2}[ here in Zephaniah 3:9.]{.class-0}

"[For then will I turn to the people a pure language."]{.class-2}[ In other words, the Lord is going to return the nations back to the state they were in ]{.class-0}[before]{.class-1}[ the Tower of Babel. Before God confused the tongues at the Tower of Babel, ]{.class-0}["the whole earth was of one language, and of one speech"]{.class-2}[ (Gen. 11:1). That language was ]{.class-0}[Hebrew.]{.class-1}[ How do you know that? Well, in Hebrew, the roots of all the words are tri-consonantal: they come from a ]{.class-0}[trinity.]{.class-1}[ Do you know what language is spoken in Heaven? It's ]{.class-0}[Hebrew.]{.class-1}[ These crazy Charismatics talk about speaking in a "heavenly language." Well, if they do, it would be ]{.class-0}[Hebrew.]{.class-1}

[Turn over to Revelation 19 and look at verses 3--6. That's the people in Heaven rejoicing over the destruction of the Roman Catholic Church. See that word ]{.class-0}["Alleluia"]{.class-2}[; you spell that "hallelujah" here in America. It's a ]{.class-0}[Hebrew]{.class-1}[ word that means "praise ye Jehovah (the LORD)." When Jesus Christ spoke to Paul on the road to Damascus, He spoke to him in ]{.class-0}[Hebrew]{.class-1}[ (Acts 26:14). ]{.class-0}[Hebrew]{.class-1}[ is the ]{.class-0}["pure language" ]{.class-2}[of Zephaniah 3:9.]{.class-0}

[One of the greatest supernatural phenomena ever ignored is the steadfastness of the Hebrew language. I have a man in my church who brings me a copy of the ]{.class-0}[Jerusalem Post]{.class-1}[ every week. The Hebrew in which that paper is written is]{.class-0}[ the same Hebrew you find in the Old Testament manuscripts ]{.class-1}[in the synagogues and the same Hebrew you find in the infamous Dead Sea Scrolls. That means those Jews have been speaking that language all the way back to the time of Moses.]{.class-0}

[Have you ever thought of this: where are all the languages of all the other countries between Moses and today? If you go over to Bagdad today, you wouldn't get anything written in ]{.class-0}[Babylonian cuneiform;]{.class-1}[ if you went to Egypt, you wouldn't get ]{.class-0}[hieroglyphics]{.class-1}[. They both died out millennia ago. The Greeks today don't speak the same Greek that Socrates, Plato, and Aristotle spoke; it's changed.]{.class-0}

[How many people speak Latin today? I don't mean use Latin terms in their]{.class-0}[ tradesmen's terminology]{.class-1}[ (like doctors and scientists do); I mean actually ]{.class-0}[speak]{.class-1}[ Latin. You might find some Roman Catholic clerics who still ]{.class-0}[read]{.class-1}[ Latin, but they don't speak it as a common language. The old schoolboy rhyme goes: "Latin is a language as dead as it can be. First it killed the Romans, and now it's killing me." ]{.class-0}[Hebrew was around for more than a thousand years before Latin showed up]{.class-1}[, and Hebrew went right past Latin when it finally kicked the bucket about the time of the Reformation, and Hebrew is still around ]{.class-0}[today]{.class-1}[.]{.class-0}

[Now you take you English-speaking people, you don't speak the same language as the Anglo-Saxons in A.D. 600 did. If you did, it would be more like German: the Saxons were from Germany. That's known as "Old English." You don't even ]{.class-0}[speak]{.class-1}[ the same language as John Wycliffe did when he made the first translation of the entire Bible into English (1380--1382); that was "Middle English." You speak what is known as "Modern English," and even ]{.class-0}[that]{.class-1}[ has changed since William Tyndale came out with the first New Testament in it in 1525. But as far as anyone can tell, the Jewish people are speaking the same language they did in 1500 B.C.]{.class-0}

[I'll show you something else about that Jew. Do you have a German background? Can you give me the name of the ]{.class-0}[first German?]{.class-1}[ What was the name of the ]{.class-0}[first Scotsman?]{.class-1}[ Who was the first Frenchman or the first Englishman or the first Irishman or the first Spaniard? Why, you can't tell; it's impossible. ]{.class-0}[But that Jew can trace his ancestry back to the first three generations of his people (Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob). There's a supernatural touch on that Jew.]{.class-1}

[A Christian was asked one time to give one proof that the Bible was true, and he replied, "The Jew." What he meant by that is that that Jew is still around when ]{.class-0}[all other ancient peoples]{.class-1}[ are gone. There are no more full-blooded Edomites, Moabites, Ammonites, or Philistines around; they've all intermarried into Arabic "Palestinians." There are no more Babylonians, Assyrians, Chaldeans, Medes, or Persians; they were conquered by the Moslems and became Iraqis and Iranians. The Romans didn't retain their racial identity: they became Italians. But those Jews started out Jews, and they have stayed Jews for over 3,500 years despite genocide, pogroms, ghettos, exile, and persecution. Brethren, if the Polish people had been subjected to ]{.class-0}[what that Jew has gone through,]{.class-1}[ there wouldn't be a Pollock left alive on this planet. That nation is a supernatural ]{.class-0}[nation]{.class-1}[, that language is a supernatural ]{.class-0}[language]{.class-1}[, and that Book is a supernatural ]{.class-0}[book]{.class-1}[.]{.class-0}

[Now you know me, I am ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ all the way. I believe ]{.class-0}[that]{.class-1}[ Book is the final authority in all matters of faith and practice and is able to judge where the Hebrew and Greek manuscripts are ]{.class-0}[right]{.class-1}[ and where they are ]{.class-0}[wrong]{.class-1}[. I've been exposed to everything to which John R. Rice, Curtis Hutson, Shelton Smith, Bob Jones Jr., Bob Jones III, and Bob Jones three-fifths and five-tenths were exposed. I have been taught everything that Westcott, Hort, Nestle, and Aland were taught.]{.class-0}[ None of them read a book I didn't read.]{.class-1}[ If they ]{.class-0}[did]{.class-1}[, it could be sent to me, and I would critique it and send it back in ]{.class-0}[24 hours]{.class-1}[ because I would know ]{.class-0}[everything]{.class-1}[ ]{.class-0}[behind]{.class-1}[ ]{.class-0}[it]{.class-1}[ and the ]{.class-0}[ones]{.class-1}[ who taught those people their material and ]{.class-0}[the one]{.class-1}[ who wrote the book they used. That being the case, I am not changing my mind on the Book.]{.class-0}

[The first time anyone ever opened that Book and showed me something out of it was in a radio station when Hugh Pyle led me to Christ. He said, "Do you believe ]{.class-0}[this Bible]{.class-1}[ is the word of God?" (By that time I had been worked over by the Holy Spirit for about three months with nobody teaching me; I was so upset by what I was reading that I was losing about five pounds a week.) I looked at that ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ Bible in Hugh's hand and said, "Yeah, ]{.class-0}[that's it."]{.class-1}[ If you were to ask me today if I thought it was the word of God, do you know what I would say? I'd say, ]{.class-0}["That's it."]{.class-1}[ I wonder how come I didn't move and the rest of them did.]{.class-0}

[I mean, we all have the same background. My Hebrew teacher was Charles Brokenshire---"Old Brokey" they called him at Bob Jones University. He had degrees from Edinburgh, Princeton, and Heidelburg; and he could speak, read, and write eight different languages. When he died, he had been filling out grade cards, and on the back of mine he wrote: "This man can teach Hebrew." He left me his personal copy of ]{.class-0}[Biblica Hebraica.]{.class-1}[ What he taught me about Hebrew is exactly what all of the apostates were taught, but they never moved me from the English to the Hebrew.]{.class-0}

[My Greek professor was Dr. William T. Brunner. He had been a private pupil of Dr. A. T. Robertson who wrote the monumental work on Greek grammar (]{.class-0}[all]{.class-1}[ the standard textbooks on Greek, like Machen's, are taken from A. T. Robertson's work). Dr. Brunner had memorized all 5,000 vocabulary words from the Greek New Testament, and he could critique A. T. Robertson's work. There was one time where everyone in class except two of us were out sick for about four months. Dr. Brunner would sit there and quiz us on our vocabulary.]{.class-0}

"[Mr. Ruckman, what part of speech is this?"]{.class-0}

"[It's a participle."]{.class-0}

"[Is it adjectival or adverbial?"]{.class-0}

"[Uh, adverbial?"]{.class-0}

"[Are you sure?"]{.class-0}

"[Yes."]{.class-0}

"[You're right."]{.class-0}

[With only ]{.class-0}[two]{.class-1}[ of us in that class, I would get every other question.]{.class-0}[ That went on for four months. ]{.class-1}[I never gave up ]{.class-0}[one word]{.class-1}[ on the ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ Bible for Dr. Brunner.]{.class-0}

Brunner was my faculty advisor for my graduate courses. He saw how well I was doing in my freshman year of Greek, and he allowed me to skip three years of Greek and move right into graduate Greek. I went from freshman Greek the first year to Seminary Greek the next. When I was getting ready to choose my major for my post-graduate work, I remember I was up in his office in the administration building on a cold winter afternoon. His window faced out toward Paris Mountain. I was sitting there, and he asked me, "Mr. Ruckman, what do you intend to do in the ministry? Do you intend to preach or teach?"

[Well, at the time I was "Gung Ho" to be an evangelist like Billy Graham. I wanted to ]{.class-0}[preach]{.class-1}[ and see grown men walk the aisle and]{.class-0}[ get saved. ]{.class-1}[So I said, "I want to preach."]{.class-0}

"[Well then," he said, "I would suggest you major in ]{.class-0}[theology]{.class-1}[ instead of Greek grammar."]{.class-0}

I said, "But you let me skip three years of it. Weren't my grades all right?"

"[Your grades were fine," he said, "but there is something else you should consider."]{.class-0}

[With that, he walked over to the window and stared out it while he talked to me. He never turned around and looked at me again until he had finished his speech. It was just like he was talking to ]{.class-0}[himself]{.class-1}[.]{.class-0}

[He said, "Mr. Ruckman, years ago, I fell under the spell of that great Greek scholar A. T. Robertson. I sat under him for eight years, four of them as his private pupil. When I finished, I got to the place where all I could see in the New Testament was ]{.class-0}[Greek grammar]{.class-1}[ and ]{.class-0}[syntax]{.class-1}[. I wanted to be a soulwinner. I've tried, but I just don't seem to be able to win anybody to Christ."]{.class-0}

[He went on: "I was out in a field the other day (and he pointed off somewhere towards Traveler's Rest) witnessing to a farmer who didn't believe in Hell. I tried showing him out of my Greek New Testament that there was a Hell, and after about fifteen minutes, he said to me, 'You know what your trouble is, mister? ]{.class-0}[You know too much.']{.class-1}[ ]{.class-0}[I couldn't lead him to Christ."]{.class-1}

[That's what I was exposed to, and that's one of the reasons I haven't budged ]{.class-0}[an inch]{.class-1}[ on the Book. I believe it ]{.class-0}[is]{.class-1}[ the word of God from cover to cover (including the cover), and I think the Holy Spirit is all over that Book and through that Book and in that Book. I believe it is the very ]{.class-0}[words]{.class-1}[ that God wants you to have in the ]{.class-0}[universal language]{.class-1}[ of the last days---English. But that being said, the ]{.class-0}["pure language"]{.class-2}[ of Heaven is ]{.class-0}[not]{.class-1}[ English; it's Hebrew. Right now, God's using that English Bible to reach lost Gentiles, but when He sits on the ]{.class-0}[throne of David ]{.class-1}[as the ]{.class-0}[King of the Jews,]{.class-1}[ He won't be using English or Greek; He'll be speaking ]{.class-0}[Hebrew.]{.class-1}

[Back to verse 9: ]{.class-0}["that they may all call upon the name of the LORD."]{.class-2}[ Now in the passage, ]{.class-0}["the name of the LORD,"]{.class-2}[ of course, would be ]{.class-0}[Jehovah,]{.class-1}[ but remember, this is a Millennial reference. It is Jehovah on the throne in the person of His Son (Zech. 14:3--4, 9), ]{.class-0}["God\...in the flesh"]{.class-2}[ (1 Tim. 3:16), so "the name" is ]{.class-0}[Jesus Christ]{.class-1}[ (1 John 5:20).]{.class-0}

"[To serve him with one consent."]{.class-2}[ Now, while practical application can certainly be made to New Testament salvation in the Church Age (see what Paul does in Rom. 9:25, 10:13), verse 9 has nothing to do ]{.class-0}[doctrinally]{.class-1}[ with Gentiles in the Body of Christ at all. In the Bible, there are ]{.class-0}[two]{.class-1}[ callings out of the Gentiles: one in the Church Age and the other in the Millennium (see the comments on Acts 15:16--17 and Amos 9:11--12 in those respective Commentaries). You are at the tail end of the first calling out that began in Acts 28:28 (which see). When you are saved, you are placed ]{.class-0}[spiritually]{.class-1}[ into a Body that is not bound by the Old Testament Law or the Sabbath (Col. 2:13--16), but when Jesus Christ sits on the throne of David as King of the Jews, the Gentiles who come to Him then will be bound by ]{.class-0}[both]{.class-1}[. Look at Isaiah 56.]{.class-0}

"[Also the sons of the stranger ]{.class-2}[\[there's your Gentiles\]]{.class-0}[, that join themselves to the LORD, to serve him, and to love the name of the LORD, to be his servants]{.class-2}[ \[like you just read it in Zeph. 3:9\]]{.class-0}[, every one that keepeth the sabbath ]{.class-2}[\[see where the Seventh-day Adventists get their false doctrine. They put that verse on you just where it doesn't belong\]]{.class-0}[ from polluting it, and taketh hold of my covenant"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 56:6).]{.class-0}

[That's the Jewish Sabbath and the new covenant made with Israel (Isa. 56:4 cf. Jer. 31:31--34), ]{.class-0}[so it has nothing to do with you right now.]{.class-1}[ Well, if it's ]{.class-0}[not]{.class-1}[ the Church Age, when is it? Look at the next verse.]{.class-0}

"[Even them ]{.class-2}[\[the Gentiles of Isa. 56:6) ]{.class-0}[will I bring to my holy mountain ]{.class-2}[\[that's Mt. Zion from where Jesus Christ rules as King---Psa. 2:6\]]{.class-0}[, and make them joyful in my house of prayer ]{.class-2}[\[see what Christ said in Mark 11:17 and notice the ]{.class-0}["all nations"]{.class-2}[\]]{.class-0}[: their burnt offerings and their sacrifices shall be accepted upon mine altar"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 56:7).]{.class-0}

[What does that have to do with the Church Age? Nothing. Your sacrifice is the one effectual sacrifice of Jesus Christ on the cross (Heb. 10:8--12). But when Christ returns at the Second Advent, the Temple is rebuilt, ]{.class-0}[and the sacrifices on the altar are reinstituted]{.class-1}[ (Ezek. 41--46). Your modern Fundamentalists can't understand offerings to make blood atonement for ]{.class-0}[nations]{.class-1}[ (see 2 Chron. 29:21--24; Isa. 60:7--12) because they've messed with Colossians 2:16--17 (see comments on the passage in that Commentary).]{.class-0}

"[The Lord GOD which gathereth the outcasts of Israel ]{.class-2}[\[Second Advent\]]{.class-0}[ saith, Yet will I gather others ]{.class-2}[\[a second gathering of the Gentiles during the Millennium\]]{.class-0}[ to him, beside those that are gathered unto him"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 56:8).]{.class-0}

[Back to Zephaniah 3: ]{.class-0}["From beyond the rivers of Ethiopia my suppliants, even the daughter of my dispersed, shall bring mine offering"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 10). These are ]{.class-0}[black Jews]{.class-1}[ from Ethiopia. Their official name is "Beta Israel," although you will sometimes hear them referred to as "]{.class-0}[Falasha]{.class-1}[" or "]{.class-0}[Habashim]{.class-1}[." There are all kinds of legends and stories about how they got down there. One claims that Solomon had relations with the Queen of Sheba and had a black son named Menelik I who took the Ark of the Covenant down to Ethiopia and started a Jewish kingdom there. Of course, that is absolute nonsense and has no Scriptural backing whatsoever (read the account in 1 Kings 10 and compare it with what the Holy Spirit records in 2 Chron. 35:3 and Matt. 12:42). A far more credible account says they migrated to Ethiopia when the Jewish remnant fled to Egypt after the destruction of Jerusalem (Jer. 43). They claim to be from the tribe of Dan.]{.class-0}

Of course, the Ethiopian eunuch in Acts 8 was a professing Jew. The Emperor Haile Selassie, although he was a professing Christian, called himself "the Lion of the tribe of Judah" (cf. Rev. 5:5). In 1984, 1985, and 1991, the Israeli government mounted rescue operations to bring the Ethiopian Jews to Israel to save them from the Moslems in Sudan and the Communists in Ethiopia. This was a type of the final rescue by their Messiah at the Second Advent (see Psa. 68:30--31).

"[Shall bring my offering."]{.class-2}[ As we told you in the comments on Isaiah 56:7 under verse 9, the ]{.class-0}["offering" ]{.class-2}[here ]{.class-0}[is not]{.class-1}[ an offering for the sins of any ]{.class-0}[individual]{.class-1}[ Jew. As a nation, Israel is a ]{.class-0}[corporate ]{.class-1}[son of God (Exod. 4:22), and the offerings in the Millennial Temple of Ezekiel 41--46 are for the ]{.class-0}[corporate atonement of the nation, ]{.class-1}[not for the personal salvation of any Jew. A Jewish son of Abraham goes to Hell if he does not accept Jesus Christ as his Saviour (Luke 16:22--25 cf. Matt. 8:11--12); he has to be born again by the shed blood of Christ just like any Gentile. But in the Millennium, those sacrifices look back to the sacrifice of Christ, and they restore the ]{.class-0}[nation]{.class-1}[ to fellowship with their Messiah. ]{.class-0}[That's rejected by all the scholars except Clarence Larkin;]{.class-1}[ he's the only one who got it right. The reason for that is because they change the ]{.class-0}["ARE a shadow of things to come"]{.class-2}[ ]{.class-16}[to ]{.class-0}["WERE a shadow of things to come" ]{.class-1}[in Colossians 2:17, thus ridding themselves of the future application. When you mess with the Book, you lose revelation; when you mess with the Book, God messes with your mind.]{.class-0}

"[In that day shalt thou not be ashamed for all thy doings, wherein thou hast transgressed against me"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 11). That's what happens to Israel at the Second Advent (Isa. 45:17, 54:4, 61:7; Joel 2:26--27). Notice that first reference.]{.class-0}

"[But Israel shall be saved in the LORD with an everlasting salvation: ye shall not be ashamed nor confounded world without end"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 45:17).]{.class-0}

[That's the salvation of ]{.class-0}[the nation]{.class-1}[ that Jesus Christ brings at the Second Advent; when He does, He makes a ]{.class-0}[new covenant]{.class-1}[ with Israel that's different from both the Mosaic covenant and the New Testament as applied to Jews and Gentiles right now (see comments on Rom. 11:25--27 in that Commentary).]{.class-0}

"[For then I will take away out of the midst of thee them that rejoice in thy pride, and thou shalt no more be haughty because of my holy mountain." ]{.class-2}[One of the problems with that Jew is ]{.class-0}[pride]{.class-1}[: pride of ]{.class-0}[place]{.class-1}[ (Jer. 7:4, 9--12; Ezek. 24:21)and pride of ]{.class-0}[race]{.class-1}[ (Matt. 3:9; Rom 2:17). The Lord takes care of that at the Second Advent (Isa. 2:12, 5:14--15).]{.class-0}

"[I will also leave in the midst of thee an afflicted and poor people" ]{.class-2}[(vs. 12 cf. Isa. 14:32). The ]{.class-0}["thee"]{.class-2}[ of the verse is Israel in general and Jerusalem specifically. Now Jerusalem is turned over to the ]{.class-0}["afflicted"]{.class-2}[ and ]{.class-0}["poor"]{.class-2}[ for more than just the purpose of humility (see vs. 11). In the Tribulation, the only rich Jews are the ones who take the Mark of the Beast (Rev. 13:16--17).]{.class-0}

[Do you recall over in Nehemiah 11:1 where a tenth of the Jews who returned from the captivity were chosen ]{.class-0}[by lot]{.class-1}[ to dwell in Jerusalem? Well, that tenth is the ]{.class-0}[Biblical tithe.]{.class-1}[ Normally it was cattle and seed that were tithed (Lev. 27:30--32). But in Nehemiah 11:1, the Jews themselves are tithed because they are connected with a ]{.class-0}["seed"]{.class-2}[ (Mal. 2:15; Ezra 2:59; Neh. 7:61, 9:8) --- seeds are planted to grow something to ]{.class-0}[eat.]{.class-1}[ ]{.class-0}

[When the Lord fed Israel with manna in the wilderness, a tithe of that manna was laid up before the Lord (Exod. 16:33--36). Since that was part of the ]{.class-0}["parable"]{.class-2}[ of what will happen in the Tribulation (Psa. 78:2--3), the tithe is a picture of a bunch of poor, persecuted Jews who flee to the wilderness to escape the Antichrist and ]{.class-0}[are miraculously fed with manna]{.class-1}[ just as in Exodus and Numbers (Mic. 7:14--15 cf. Rev. 12:6, 14). The ones who don't get away and who don't take the mark are eaten by the priests of the Antichrist at the altar in the temple at Jerusalem (Isa. 6:13; Psa. 16:4, 106:37; Rev. 6:9, 20:4). When Jesus Christ comes back, He rescues those Jews in the wilderness and resurrects the ones who were martyred and turns Jerusalem over to them.]{.class-0}

"[And they shall trust in the name of the LORD"]{.class-2}[ (see the comment on vs. 9).]{.class-0}

[Notice ]{.class-0}["the remnant of Israel" ]{.class-2}[in verse 13. When Paul says ]{.class-0}["And so all Israel shall be saved"]{.class-2}[ (Rom. 11:26), that's what he's talking about (see Rom. 11:4--5). He's talking about a small group of Jews at the end of the Tribulation who won't worship the Beast or take his mark; he's not talking about every Jew who has ever lived.]{.class-0}

[There's a heresy making its way through Evangelical, Fundamental, and even Bible-believing Christians that you don't need to witness to any Jew because ]{.class-0}["all Israel shall be saved."]{.class-2}[ That's a lie out of Hell. Korah, Dathan, and Abiram went to Hell (Num. 16); the rich man in Luke 16 went to Hell; the Pharisees and scribes who rejected Christ went to Hell (Matt. 23:15); ]{.class-0}[any Jew who rejects Christ goes to Hell]{.class-1}[ (Matt. 8:12). They don't get out. Hell for an unsaved Jew is not spelled P-U-R-G-A-T-O-R-Y. In the very chapter used to prove that heresy, you are commanded to have mercy on that Jew and give him the Gospel so he can receive God's mercy and be saved NOW (Rom. 11:28--32).]{.class-0}

[For the doctrinal application of verse 13, see Micah 4:7; Isaiah 60:21; Ezekiel 36:23--38, 34:13-28. It's the restoration of Israel at the Second Advent; there's no way you can put it on the Church Age right ]{.class-0}[now]{.class-1}[. Right ]{.class-0}[now]{.class-1}[, Israel is dwelling in fear of Moslem suicide bombers, rocket attacks from Lebanon and Gaza, and a nuclear holocaust from Iran.]{.class-0}

[For the Scriptural commentary on verse 14, read Isaiah 12---the whole chapter---and note the context: ]{.class-0}["in that day"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 12:1). The reference is to the Day of the Lord, the Second Advent.]{.class-0}

[Practically speaking, a person sings because he is ]{.class-0}[happy.]{.class-1}[ In Islam, music and singing are a violation of Sharia (Koranic) law: that's because Mohammedanism is a ]{.class-0}[miserable religion]{.class-1}[. Moslems have nothing about which to sing because their "prophet" (Mohammed) never did anything for them. My Prophet ]{.class-0}[died for me,]{.class-1}[ and the natural response of the child of God to that ]{.class-0}[is singing]{.class-1}[ (see the work on ]{.class-0}[God Is Love]{.class-1}[).]{.class-0}

"[Arise my soul, arise; Shake off they guilty fears; The bleeding Sacrifice In my behalf appears: Before the throne my Surety stands, Before the throne my Surety stands, My name is written on His hands."]{.class-0}

[The largest book in the Bible is a ]{.class-0}[hymn book.]{.class-1}[ In that book you are commanded to ]{.class-0}["Sing unto the LORD a new song"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 149:1), and ]{.class-0}["come before his presence with singing"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 100:1). When you come over to the New Testament, the Apostle Paul commands the born-again child of God: ]{.class-0}["Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly in all wisdom; teaching and admonishing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your hearts to the Lord"]{.class-2}[ (Col. 3:16). The example of your Saviour is that in the midst of trouble you should ]{.class-0}[sing]{.class-1}[ praise to God (Matt. 26:30). And when you get to Heaven, you find the saints ]{.class-0}[singing]{.class-1}[ their own ]{.class-0}["new song"]{.class-2}[ to the Lamb: ]{.class-0}["Thou art worthy\...for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to God by thy blood out of every kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation"]{.class-2}[ (Rev. 5:9).]{.class-0}

"[Sing\...be glad and rejoice with all the heart."]{.class-2}

"[The king of Israel, even the LORD, is in the midst of thee"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 15); ]{.class-0}["The LORD thy God in the midst of thee"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 17). That's not ]{.class-0}[now.]{.class-1}[ Jesus told that Samaritan woman: ]{.class-0}["the hour cometh, when ye shall neither in this mountain, nor yet at Jerusalem, worship the Father"]{.class-2}[ (John 4:21). Right now, the place doesn't matter; what God wants is worship ]{.class-0}["in spirit and in truth"]{.class-2}[ (John 4:24). Right now, the Holy Spirit dwells in the body of the believer: that is His temple (1 Cor. 3:16, 6:19).]{.class-0}

[But in the Millennium, it is a different story. Jerusalem ]{.class-0}[does]{.class-1}[ matter as the place of worship (vs. 16). That's because Jesus Christ is right there, bodily, sitting on the throne of David. Isaiah 24:23 says, ]{.class-0}["the LORD of hosts shall reign in mount Zion, and in Jerusalem."]{.class-2}[ That's not God the Father; that's God the Son---Jesus Christ.]{.class-0}

"[Yet have I set my king upon my holy hill of Zion. I will declare the decree: the LORD hath said unto me, Thou art my Son; this day have I begotten thee"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 2:6--7).]{.class-0}

[That's ]{.class-0}[not]{.class-1}[ a reference to the heavenly Zion of Hebrews 12:22. Isaiah 11 says, ]{.class-0}["And there shall come forth a rod out of the stem of Jesse, and a Branch shall grow out his roots: And the spirit of the LORD shall rest upon him"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 11:1). That's a Messianic prophecy to Jesus Christ as the Son of David. You keep reading down through Isaiah 11, and there in verse 4 is the Second Advent. In verses 6--8 is the regeneration of the earth during the Millennium (Matt. 19:28; Acts 3:21).]{.class-0}

[Then when you get down to verses 9--10 you read: ]{.class-0}["They shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain]{.class-2}[ \[Mt. Zion---Psa. 2:6\]]{.class-0}[: for the EARTH ]{.class-2}[\[not Heaven\]]{.class-0}[ shall be full of the knowledge of the LORD, as the waters cover the sea. And in that day there shall be a root of Jesse ]{.class-2}[\[Jesus Christ in Isa. 11:1--2\]]{.class-0}[, which shall stand for an ensign of the people; to it shall the Gentiles seek"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 11:9--10).]{.class-0}

[During the Millennium, if those Gentiles don't come to Jerusalem to worship Jesus Christ at the Feast of Tabernacles, the Lord shuts off the rain (Zech. 14:16--19). You have God in the flesh right there in Jerusalem, so the city is called ]{.class-0}[Jehovah-shamma]{.class-1}[---]{.class-0}["the LORD is there"]{.class-2}[ (Ezek. 48:35). The city no longer has anything to fear (vs. 16) because ]{.class-0}["the LORD is there"]{.class-2}[; they can ]{.class-0}[see]{.class-1}[ Him.]{.class-0}

"[O Zion, that bringest good tidings, get thee up into the high mountain; O Jerusalem, that bringest good tidings, lift up thy voice with strength; lift it up, be not afraid; say unto the cities of Judah, Behold your God!"]{.class-2}[ (Isa. 40:9).]{.class-0}

"[He will rejoice over thee with joy\...he will joy over thee with singing"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 17). Now this isn't the Jewish remnant singing about their King as you just read in verse 14;]{.class-0}[ this is the Lord singing about those Jews]{.class-1}[ (see Isa. 65:18--19). That's like the Bridegroom bragging about the Bride throughout the Song of Solomon. Of course, we understand that any good in us is not our own; it's from God. But even then, why would the Lord rejoice over us at all?]{.class-0}

[Now the last three verses of Zephaniah 3 all deal with one thing---the regathering of the Jews back to the land of Israel: ]{.class-0}["I will gather them that are sorrowful for the solemn assembly"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 18), ]{.class-0}["I will save her that halteth, and gather her that was driven out"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 19), ]{.class-0}["At that time will I bring you again, even in the time that I gather you"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 20). That gathering began in 1948, and it continues through the Tribulation and into the Millennium. Of course, people like Texe Marrs and J. Vernon McGee teach that the Jews over in Palestine right now are not the ]{.class-0}["gathering"]{.class-2}[ prophesied in the Old Testament, but look at Isaiah 11:11.]{.class-0}

"[And it shall come to pass in that day, that the Lord shall set his hand again the SECOND TIME to recover the remnant of his people."]{.class-2}

[The first time ]{.class-1}[was under Zerubbabel and Joshua, and Ezra and Nehemiah; ]{.class-0}[the second time]{.class-1}[ was under George V of England in 1917 with the Balfour Declaration and in 1948 when Israel became a nation again. ]{.class-0}[There is no third time.]{.class-1}[ The second regathering goes on until Messiah shows up, just like the first one did.]{.class-0}

[When Christ came the first time, He fulfilled 48 Old Testament prophecies, but there are over ten times that many in regards to His Second Coming. There are 500 prophecies in the Old Testament that deal with a Judean King sitting on a ]{.class-0}[literal throne ]{.class-1}[of a ]{.class-0}[literal]{.class-1}[, physical, ]{.class-0}[visible Jewish kingdom with Jerusalem as its capital.]{.class-1}[ Some of the best work you can read on the subject was written around the turn of the Twentieth Century by the early Premillennialists and Dispensationalists, right when both movements were beginning to take off. They show you that the ]{.class-0}[theocratic kingdom]{.class-1}[ is ]{.class-0}[not]{.class-1}[ any kingdom or nation on this earth today, nor is it the present, ]{.class-0}[spiritual Kingdom of God]{.class-1}[. That kingdom won't return until the King comes back (see the work ]{.class-0}[Sure Word of Prophecy]{.class-1}[).]{.class-0}

Now there is not room here to give you all 500 references, but I will give you a few of the passages in regards to the regathering of Israel to the land.

[First of all, Isaiah 60:9--15, ]{.class-0}["Surely the isles shall wait for me, and the ships of Tarshish first ]{.class-2}[\[that's in Spain. The Spaniards exiled those Jews in 1492, but they're going to bring them back to the Promised Land in the Millennium\]]{.class-0}[, to bring thy sons from far, their silver and their gold with them, unto the name of the LORD thy God, and to the Holy One of Israel]{.class-2}[ \[a reference to Jesus Christ---see the commentary on Hab. 1:12\]]{.class-0}[, because he ]{.class-2}[\[the Lord\]]{.class-0}[ hath glorified thee ]{.class-2}[\[Israel\]]{.class-0}[. And the sons of strangers ]{.class-2}[\[Gentiles\]]{.class-0}[ shall build up thy walls, and their kings shall minister unto thee ]{.class-2}[\[that's the UN waiting on the Jews\]]{.class-0}[: for in my wrath I smote thee ]{.class-2}[\[during the Church Age\]]{.class-0}[, but in my favour have I had mercy on thee ]{.class-2}[\[in the Millennium\]]{.class-0}[. Therefore thy gates shall be open continually; they shall not be shut day nor night; that men may bring unto thee the forces of the Gentiles, and that their king may be brought ]{.class-2}[\[the Millennial Jerusalem is a type of the New Jerusalem in Eternity---Rev. 21:24--26\]. ]{.class-0}[For the nation and kingdom that will not serve thee shall perish; yea, those nations shall be utterly wasted ]{.class-2}[\[just as I showed you from Zech. 14\]]{.class-0}[\....The sons also of them that afflicted thee ]{.class-2}[\[Germans, Russians, Italians, Moslems\]]{.class-0}[ shall come bending unto thee; and all they that despised thee shall bow themselves down at the soles of thy feet ]{.class-2}[\[isn't that a horrible thought for the anti-Zionists\]]{.class-0}[, and they shall call thee, The city of the LORD ]{.class-2}[\[like I showed you over in Ezek. 48:35\]]{.class-0}[, The Zion of the Holy One of Israel. Whereas thou hast been forsaken and hated ]{.class-2}[\[in the Church Age\]]{.class-0}[, so that no man went through thee, I will make thee an eternal excellency, a joy of many generations."]{.class-2}

[Jeremiah 32:37--42, ]{.class-0}["Behold, I will gather them out of all countries, whither I have driven them in mine anger ]{.class-2}[\[Europe, Asia, Africa, Australia, South America, and the United States\]]{.class-0}[, and in my fury, and in great wrath ]{.class-2}[\[in the Church Age\]]{.class-0}[; and I will bring them again unto this place ]{.class-2}[\[they're there now\]]{.class-0}[, and I will cause them to dwell safely ]{.class-2}[\[in the Millennium, not now\]]{.class-0}[: And they shall be my people, and I will be their God: And I will give them one heart, and one way, that they may fear me for ever, for the good of them, and of their children after them]{.class-2}[ \[that's the eternal conversion of the nation to where it never produces an unsaved man, woman, or child again\]]{.class-0}[: And I will make an everlasting covenant with them ]{.class-2}[\[that's the new testament applied to the nation of Israel, not sinners in the Body of Christ---see Heb. 8:8--11 and note ]{.class-0}["the house of Israel"]{.class-2}[ and ]{.class-0}["the house of Judah"]{.class-2}[ in vs. 8\]]{.class-0}[, that I will not turn away from them, to do them good ]{.class-2}[\[permanent blessing\]]{.class-0}[; but I will put my fear in their hearts, that they shall not depart from me. Yea, I will rejoice over them to do them good, and I will plant them in this land]{.class-2}[ \[is that clear? It is ]{.class-0}[God]{.class-1}[ who put those Jews in that land\]]{.class-0}[ assuredly with my whole heart and with my whole soul ]{.class-2}[\[that's God talking; is there any doubt in your mind that He's going to do it\]]{.class-0}[. For thus saith the LORD; Like as I have brought all this great evil upon this people, so will I bring upon them all the good that I have promised them ]{.class-2}[\[that's the Lord Himself overturning what He said and did in Deut. 28:63, one of the most terrible verses in that Bible\]]{.class-0}[."]{.class-2}

[Isaiah 43:1--7, ]{.class-0}["But now thus saith the LORD that created thee, O Jacob, and he that formed thee, O Israel, Fear not: for I have redeemed thee, I have called thee by thy name; thou art mine\....Fear not: for I am with thee: I will bring thy seed from the east ]{.class-2}[\[Iraq, Iran, Afghanistan, India, China, Pakistan\]]{.class-0}[, and gather thee from the west ]{.class-2}[\[Europe\]]{.class-0}[; I will say to the north ]{.class-2}[\[Russia\]]{.class-0}[, Give up; and to the south ]{.class-2}[\[Africa\]]{.class-0}[, Keep not back: bring my sons from far, and my daughters from the ends of the earth ]{.class-2}[\[North and South America, Australia, New Zealand, etc.\]]{.class-0}[; Even every one that is called by my name: for I have created him for my glory, I have formed him: yea, I have made him."]{.class-2}

[Back to Isaiah 11:11 and also verse 12, ]{.class-0}["And it shall come to pass in that day, that the Lord shall set his hand again the second time to recover the remnant of his people, which shall be left, from Assyria ]{.class-2}[\[northern Iraq\]]{.class-0}[, and from Egypt, and from Pathros ]{.class-2}[\[upper Egypt\]]{.class-0}[, and from Cush ]{.class-2}[\[that's Ethiopia; see the comments under Zeph. 3:10\]]{.class-0}[, and from Elam]{.class-2}[ \[that's in Iran\], ]{.class-0}[and from Shinar]{.class-2}[ \[Iraq around Bagdad\]]{.class-0}[, and from Hamath ]{.class-2}[\[that's in Syria\]]{.class-0}[, and from the islands of the sea ]{.class-2}[\[Crete, Cyprus, Sardinia, Corsica, the Aegean isles, but also ]{.class-0}[England]{.class-1}[\]]{.class-0}[. And he shall set up an ensign for the nations ]{.class-2}[\[Jesus Christ---see Isa. 11:10\]]{.class-0}[, and shall assemble the outcasts of Israel, and gather together the dispersed of Judah from the four corners of the earth."]{.class-2}

[Back to Zephaniah 3: ]{.class-0}["I will gather them that are sorrowful for the solemn assembly, who are of thee, to whom the reproach of it was a burden" ]{.class-2}[(vs. 18). Now after just telling them to ]{.class-0}["sing"]{.class-2}[ and ]{.class-0}["be glad and rejoice"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 14), and after telling them that He would rejoice over them and sing about them (vs. 17), why is the Lord gathering a bunch of ]{.class-0}["sorrowful]{.class-2}[" Jews to a ]{.class-0}["solemn assembly"]{.class-2}[?]{.class-0}

[Well, that rejoicing is ]{.class-0}[after]{.class-1}[ the Lord Jesus Christ is installed as King, but when He first comes back at the Second Advent, that is not the case. Turn to Zechariah 12:10--12 and notice in verses 4--9 that the context is ]{.class-0}[the Second Advent.]{.class-1}

"[And I will pour upon the house of David, and upon the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the spirit of grace and of supplications; and they shall look upon me whom they have pierced]{.class-2}[ \[that's the Lord Jesus Christ (Rev. 1:7); after His resurrection, He still had the nailprints in His hands and feet (John 20:27)\]]{.class-0}[, and they shall mourn for him, as one mourneth for his only son, and shall be in bitterness for him, as one that is in bitterness for his firstborn. In that day shall there be a great mourning in Jerusalem, as the mourning of Hadadrimmon in the valley of Megiddon]{.class-2}[ \[that's Armageddon\]]{.class-0}[. And the land shall mourn, every family apart."]{.class-2}

[When Christ comes back and rescues those Jews, they finally see Him and realize who He is and what they did to Him back at the Crucifixion, and they repent in tears (Jer. 31:8--9). The Lord brings them back to the land and receives them just like the father received back the Prodigal Son (Luke 15:17--20). The merriment and singing and dancing didn't begin until the son said, ]{.class-0}["I have sinned against heaven, and in thy sight, and am no more worthy to be called thy son"]{.class-2}[ (Luke 15:21--25).]{.class-0}

[The idea that the ]{.class-0}[present return to the land of Israel]{.class-1}[ by the Jews is ]{.class-0}[not]{.class-1}[ the one prophesied in Scripture because they are in unbelief, not trusting Christ as Saviour, is sheer nonsense and stupidity. Why would those Jews in Zechariah 12:10--12 be in mourning at Christ's return if they were already trusting Christ as Saviour? Doesn't your Bible say there is ]{.class-0}["a crown of righteousness" ]{.class-2}[for]{.class-0}[ "all them also that love his appearing"]{.class-2}[ (2 Tim. 4:8)? Wasn't that written to believers in Christ? Isn't the Second Coming of Christ the ]{.class-0}["blessed hope"]{.class-2}[ for the believer? Then what would someone who is trusting in Christ as Saviour be doing mourning]{.class-0}[ when he sees Him come back?]{.class-1}

[The cross-reference to Zechariah 12:10 is Revelation 1:7---READ IT! That verse is addressed to ]{.class-0}[lost]{.class-1}[ folks, ]{.class-0}[not]{.class-1}[ saved. Israel returns to the land in unbelief, and they are ]{.class-0}[not]{.class-1}[ converted until the day Jesus Christ returns in power. Anybody with an opinion to the contrary can go take a flying leap.]{.class-0}

"[Behold, at that time I will undo all that afflict thee" ]{.class-2}[(vs. 19). That not only includes Germany, Russia, and the Moslems, that includes the nation that turned half of the land of Israel (the lands of Reuben, Gad, and the half tribe of Manasseh) over to Mohammed ("Winnie-the-Pooh" Churchill, the "White Papers" in 1921 that created Transjordan)---England---and the nation that threatened Israel every time she was winning a defensive war against Moslem aggressors---]{.class-0}[America]{.class-1}[ (see the documented evidence in ]{.class-0}[Israel: A Deadly Piece of Dirt]{.class-1}[). Obama told Netanyahu that if Israel made any move to ]{.class-0}[stop]{.class-1}[ Iran from slinging nuclear bombs at her that the USA would ]{.class-0}[stop Israel from defending herself.]{.class-1}[ Well, God's got a message for your Moslem-loving President.]{.class-0}

"[For I am with thee, saith the LORD]{.class-2}[ \[that's God talking to Israel\]]{.class-0}[, to save thee: though I make a full end ]{.class-2}[\[not just ]{.class-0}[an end, ]{.class-1}[but ]{.class-0}["a full end"]{.class-2}[\] ]{.class-0}[of all nations whither I have scattered thee\...."]{.class-2}

[Well? Did He scatter them here in the United States? What do you mean, man? There are more Jews living in New York City right now than there are living in ]{.class-0}[Jerusalem]{.class-1}[. All right, then R.I.P. ("Rest in Peace")---]{.class-0}[you're a dead duck.]{.class-1}

[Listen, brethren, that Bible says, ]{.class-0}["Righteousness exalteth a nation: but sin is a reproach to any people"]{.class-2}[ (Prov. 14:34). When I preach to folks out on the street, I tell them: ]{.class-0}["Don't ask God to bless America.]{.class-1}[ God's not going to bless ]{.class-0}[any]{.class-1}[ country that lives the way you people live." Do you honestly think God is going ]{.class-0}[to bless]{.class-1}[ any nation that aborts a million babies every year and promotes queers, dykes, and faggots in the public schools and the military, and teaches its kids how to fornicate without suffering the consequences, and funds a multi-billion dollar drug industry, liquor industry, and pornography industry?]{.class-0}

[The Bible says, ]{.class-0}["The wicked shall be turned into hell, and all the nations that forget God"]{.class-2}[ (Psa. 9:17). America has kicked God and prayer out of the public schools and ]{.class-0}[told the chaplains in the military that they can't pray in the name of Jesus Christ.]{.class-1}[ It has made it a ]{.class-0}[hate crime]{.class-1}[ to preach what the Bible says about sex perversion, "women's lib," racial integration, and anything else the government wants to promote that's contrary to the Scriptures. And your "first black President" has gone overseas and told people ]{.class-0}[who believe you should be killed for believing Jesus Christ is the Son of God]{.class-1}[ that America is no longer a "Christian nation" (if it ever was). If that Book is right (and there isn't the slightest doubt in my mind that it is), when the smoke clears, Israel will still be here, and America will be on the ash heap with the other 190 nations in the UN.]{.class-0}

"[I will get them praise and fame in every land where they have been put to shame"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 19). Well, ]{.class-0}["they have been put to shame"]{.class-2}[ in Washington, D.C. Obama kept the Prime Minister of Israel waiting when he came over as a visiting Head of State and ]{.class-0}[then walked out on him to go have dinner. ]{.class-1}[That's your President who]{.class-0}[ bowed almost to the floor]{.class-1}[ before a Moslem King and wouldn't bend an inch before the Queen of England.]{.class-0}

"[I will make you a name and a praise among all people of the earth"]{.class-2}[ (vs. 20). One of these days you are going to see every Moslem bow flat on his face and say: "Praise be Jehovah God," "All hail to Jesus Christ, the Son of God," and "Thank God for Israel."]{.class-0}[ Sure, man! ]{.class-1}[Why would you believe the Trinity, the Incarnation, and the Vicarious Atonement and not believe that? The same God who told you about that stuff in the New Testament wrote what you're reading here in the Old Testament.]{.class-0}

One day, no Moslem will be interested in making a pilgrimage to Mecca (the Hajj), and no Catholic will want to go see Rome. Don't believe me? Look at Isaiah 2:2--4.

"[And it shall come to pass in the last days, that the mountain of the LORD'S house shall be established in the top of the mountains, and shall be exalted above the hills; and ALL NATIONS shall flow into it ]{.class-2}[\[that's the European Union, the Vatican State, the Arab League and the "Islamic Nation," and all 191 Gentile nations in the UN\]]{.class-0}[. And many people shall go and say, Come ye, and let us go up to the mountain of the LORD, to the house of the God of Jacob]{.class-2}[ \[and if they don't, God shuts off the rain---Zech. 14:16--19\]]{.class-0}[; and he will teach us of his ways, and we will walk in his paths: for out of Zion shall go forth the law, and the word of the LORD from Jerusalem]{.class-2}[ \[God's a Zionist!\]]{.class-0}[. And he shall judge among the nations ]{.class-2}[\[no more Supreme Court or World Court judging anything\]]{.class-0}[, and shall rebuke many people: and they shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruninghooks: nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they learn war any more."]{.class-2}

[Do you see the last three-quarters of verse 4? That's the inscription on the "Isaiah Wall" outside the United Nations Assembly building in New York City. The UN professes to be able to solve the problem of war forever (with over 177 wars being fought after its founding in 1945) without the Judge rebuking anybody and without Jerusalem being involved at all. In fact, between 1948 and 2003, the UN Security Council passed 97 resolutions ]{.class-0}[against Israel]{.class-1}[---nearly two every year. That was 97 out of a total of 175; that is, ]{.class-0}[over half of the resolutions ]{.class-1}[passed were ]{.class-0}[against]{.class-1}[ Israel and ]{.class-0}[against]{.class-1}[ Jerusalem. That's the UN stealing something out of the ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ Bible to give ]{.class-0}[itself]{.class-1}[ authority and then taking ]{.class-0}[credit]{.class-1}[ for what that Book says is going to take place, the whole time ]{.class-0}[denying what the passage says.]{.class-1}

[Now, Zephaniah 3:19--20 go much further than what you just read in Isaiah 2. We read earlier in Isaiah 60 how the UN is going to be the servants of Israel. Isaiah 61:5--6 says, ]{.class-0}["And strangers ]{.class-2}[\[those are the Gentile nations\]]{.class-0}[ shall stand and feed your flocks, and the sons of the alien shall be your plowmen and your vinedressers ]{.class-2}[\[the Jews are going to hire the Gentiles to take care of their cattle and their children to be their gardeners\]]{.class-0}[. But ye shall be named the Priests of the LORD: men shall call you the Ministers of our God ]{.class-2}[\[if a Gentile wants to see Jesus Christ in the Millennium, he will have to come through that Jew---Zech. 8:23\]]{.class-0}[: ye shall eat the riches of the Gentiles, and in their glory shall ye boast yourselves."]{.class-2}[ Do you see why the Gentiles hate the Jews? That Jew ends up getting everything, and the Gentile resents that. Skip on down to Isaiah 61:9.]{.class-0}

"[And their seed shall be known among the Gentiles, and their offspring among the people: all that see them shall acknowledge them, that they are the seed which the LORD hath blessed."]{.class-2}

There won't be any of this "Kazars," "lost tribes," "British Israel," "replacement theology" mess in the Millennium. Everyone will know who those Jews are and that they are God's chosen people. Let's keep going; look over at Isaiah 62:1--5.

"[For Zion's sake will I not hold my peace, and for Jerusalem's sake I will not rest, until the righteousness thereof ]{.class-2}[\[that's the righteousness of ]{.class-0}[Jerusalem]{.class-1}[\]]{.class-0}[ go forth as brightness, and the salvation thereof as a lamp that burneth. And the Gentiles shall see thy righteousness ]{.class-2}[\[the righteousness of the Jews at Jerusalem\]]{.class-0}[, and all kings thy glory: and thou shalt be called by a new name, which the mouth of the LORD shall name]{.class-2}[ \[what is it?\]]{.class-0}[\...Thou shalt no more be termed Forsaken, neither shall thy land any more be termed Desolate: but thou shalt be called Hephzibah ]{.class-2}[\[the name means "My Delight is in Her"\]]{.class-0}[, and thy land Beulah]{.class-2}[ \[it means "Married." The word's used as a type of Heaven in your hymn book, but in the context, it's the land of Israel\]]{.class-0}[: for the LORD delighteth in thee, and thy land shall be married ]{.class-2}[\[there's the Scripture interpreting the Scripture right in the same verse\]]{.class-0}[. For as a young man marrieth a virgin, so shall thy sons marry thee: and as the bridegroom rejoiceth over the bride, so shall thy God rejoice over thee."]{.class-2}

[That's the Lord remarrying Jerusalem]{.class-0}[ as a cast-off wife;]{.class-1}[ that's Hosea chapters 1--3 (see the comments in Vol. I of this Commentary). That's God putting away a Gentile bride and taking a Jewish bride like Ahasuerus did in chapters 1 and 2 of Esther (see the comments in that Commentary). God the Son has a Bride and it's the Church; but God the Father has a bride too, and it's Israel (see the comments in chapter 8 of the ]{.class-0}[Bible Believer's Commentary on the Song of Solomon]{.class-1}[). In the Millennium, the Body of Christ will be married to her Saviour Jesus Christ and will be ruling and reigning with Him; Israel will be married to Jehovah and ruling the earth from the land of Palestine as a Queen; and the Gentiles will be serving those Jews.]{.class-0}

[That Bible says the Kings and Queens of the Gentiles ]{.class-0}["shall bow down to thee]{.class-2}[ \[the Jews\]]{.class-0}[ with their face toward the earth ]{.class-2}[\[they're flat on their faces before that Jew\]]{.class-0}[, and lick up the dust of thy feet."]{.class-2}[ "All right, Obama, you bowed low before the Moslem King of Saudi Arabia; now here's that Jew you ignored and threatened! Flat on your face, buddy! Now clean the dirt off his feet with your tongue. Roll over; play dead!" Yes sir! That's the way it's going to be someday.]{.class-0}

[Zephaniah 3:20---]{.class-0}["when I turn back your captivity before your eyes, saith the LORD." ]{.class-2}[You see that expression ]{.class-0}["turn back your captivity"]{.class-2}[; do you know the first time that thing shows up ]{.class-0}[chronologically]{.class-1}[ in the Scriptures? It's in Job 42:10. Job is the first book of the Bible ever written; Archbishop Ussher places the date on the book at 1780 B.C., nearly 300 years before Moses wrote anything. That verse says: ]{.class-0}["the LORD turned the captivity of Job."]{.class-2}

"[Turned the captivity of Job"]{.class-2}[?! What do you mean ]{.class-0}["turned the captivity of Job"]{.class-2}[? Have you ever read the book of Job? Job was never taken captive by anybody.]{.class-0}

[But the book of Job is a peculiar book. In a ]{.class-0}[King James]{.class-1}[ Bible, Job falls between Esther and the book of Psalms. Do you know what you find in the order of books in the ]{.class-0}[AV]{.class-1}[ from 2 Chronicles through Psalms? At the end of 2 Chronicles, Jerusalem is destroyed just like it was in ]{.class-0}[A.D. 70; ]{.class-1}[in Ezra, a Gentile King gives the Jews back their land just as the King of England did in ]{.class-0}[1917;]{.class-1}[ in Nehemiah, Jerusalem is restored exactly as it was in ]{.class-0}[1948;]{.class-1}[ in Esther, a ]{.class-0}[Gentile bride is replaced by a Jewish bride]{.class-1}[ and a type of the Antichrist tries to kill off the Jewish race; in Job, Job is being persecuted by the Devil in the very ]{.class-0}[place]{.class-1}[ where the Jewish remnant will flee in the Tribulation (Lam. 4:21); and in Psalm 2, up shows Jesus Christ with an iron rod getting rid of a bunch of Gentile Kings and sitting down on the throne in Jerusalem.]{.class-0}

[The name ]{.class-0}[Job]{.class-1}[ means "One Persecuted." The book is 42 chapters long, ]{.class-0}[matching the 42 months of the Great Tribulation ]{.class-1}[(see Rev. 11:2, 12:6, 13:5). Job is a picture of the Jew in the Tribulation; hence the expression ]{.class-0}["turned the captivity,"]{.class-2}[ which is used over and over again for the restoration of Israel at the Second Advent (Deut. 30:3; Psa. 53:6, 85:1, 126:1, 4; Jer. 31:23, 33:7, 26).]{.class-0}

Now in regards to Job as a type of the restoration of Israel, do you know what happened at the end of Job? Well, God was angry at Job's buddies, and the only way they could get right was to come to Job and offer sacrifices and have Job pray for them, just like I showed you about that Jew in Zechariah 8:23, Isaiah 2:2--3, and Isaiah 61:6.

[Next, he gets double back of what the Devil took away. Isaiah 61:7 says about the Jews in the Millennium: ]{.class-0}["For your shame ye shall have double; and for confusion they shall rejoice in their portion: therefore in their land they shall possess the double: everlasting joy shall be unto them."]{.class-2}[ Those Jews received double punishment for their sins (Isa. 40:2; Jer. 16:18, 17:18), and the Lord's going to give them a double blessing back when He restores them.]{.class-0}

[Finally, Job got his ten children back. I teach the Lord ]{.class-0}[resurrected]{.class-1}[ the children he lost back in Job chapter 1 (see the comments on Job 42:13 in that Commentary), but the standard teaching is that he had ]{.class-0}[ten more children by another wife]{.class-1}[ (Job's wife left him in Job 2:9--10 and never ]{.class-0}[showed up again]{.class-1}[). The truth of the matter in regards to the restoration of Israel is that ]{.class-0}[both]{.class-1}[ are true. ]{.class-0}[There is a resurrection at the end of the Great Tribulation ]{.class-1}[(see Rev. 20:4--5; Ezek. 37:1--14; Isa. 26:19--20), but look also at Isaiah 49:20--23.]{.class-0}

"[The children which thou SHALT HAVE, AFTER THOU HAST LOST THE OTHER]{.class-2}[ \[God's going to give them new children in addition to the ones He resurrects\]]{.class-0}[, shall say again in thine ears, The place is too strait for me: give place to me that I may dwell. Then shalt thou say in thine heart, Who hath begotten me these, seeing I have lost my children, and am desolate, a captive, and removing to and fro? and who hath brought up these? Behold, I was left alone; these, where had they been? Thus saith the Lord GOD, Behold, I will lift up mine hand to the Gentiles, and set up my standard to the people: and they shall bring thy sons in their arms, and thy daughters shall be carried upon their shoulders. And kings shall be thy nursing fathers, and their queens thy nursing mothers."]{.class-2}

The Lord is going to give those Jews so many children that the land of Palestine won't be able to contain them; they will even overflow the borders of Reuben, Gad, and Manasseh on the east side of Jordan. In the Millennium, Israel will finally get all the land God promised to Abraham in Genesis 15:18, and she will have to have it to accommodate all the people she'll have. That's what God has in store for Israel despite everything you've heard from Jimmy Carter, Bill Clinton, George W. Bush, and Barack Obama. She'll get northern Egypt, northern Arabia, nearly all of Syria (not just the "Golan Heights"), and half of Iraq.

[]{#section-0_1_3e9427fdf2f70b71_b689.xhtml}

INTRODUCTION TO

HAGGAI

[With the book of Haggai we come to a division in the Minor Prophets. The last three books are what are known as "post-exilic" prophets; that is, they prophesied and wrote ]{.class-0}[after]{.class-1}[ (post) the Babylonian Captivity (the Exile).]{.class-0}

[The prophets come in three "sizes": "pre-exilic" (]{.class-0}[before]{.class-1}[ the captivity), "exilic" (]{.class-0}[during]{.class-1}[ the captivity), and "post-exilic" (]{.class-0}[after]{.class-1}[ the captivity). While the Exile could include the captivity of the northern kingdom of Israel by the Assyrians, generally speaking, the term is applied to the seventy years of the Babylonian Captivity (see Jer. 25:11--12, 29:10). Isaiah would be a pre-exilic prophet. Jeremiah prophesied both before and during the Exile (Jer. 1:1--3). Ezekiel and Daniel began their ministries after being carried away by Nebuchadnezzar (Ezek. 1:1--3; Dan. 1:1--6).]{.class-0}

Up to this point, all of the Minor Prophets but one (we place the date of Obadiah between 587--580 B.C.) have been pre-exilic. But Haggai and Zechariah are two prophets who returned to the land in the book of Ezra and prophesied when Zerubbabel was a governor of Israel under the Persian Empire (Ezra 5:1, 6:14). The date on the book is 520 B.C.

Haggai has 2 chapters, 38 verses, and 1,130 words. The word means "festive," supposedly because he was born on a feast day. The name is an abbreviation of the Hebrew word for "festival of Jehovah."

[Now, the feast days that the Lord instituted are given in Leviticus 23. There are ]{.class-0}[seven]{.class-1}[ of them: Passover, Unleavened Bread, Firstfruits, Pentecost (Harvest), Trumpets, the Day of Atonement, and Tabernacles. The theme of Haggai, as that of all the Minor Prophets, is the Second Coming of Christ. The ]{.class-0}[first four feasts]{.class-1}[ have to do with Christ's First Coming. Passover, Unleavened Bread, and Firstfruits are associated with Christ's death, burial, and resurrection (cf. 1 Cor. 5:7); Pentecost, of course, is the practical beginning of the Church (1 Cor. 12:13 cf. Acts 1:5, 2:1--4).]{.class-0}

[The feasts associated with the Second Advent are the Feast of Trumpets, the Day of Atonement, and the Feast of Tabernacles. The Feast of Trumpets (]{.class-0}[Rosh Hashanah]{.class-1}[) has to do with a post-Tribulation rapture of Jewish saints (Rev. 14; Matt. 25). The Day of Atonement (]{.class-0}[Yom Kippur]{.class-1}[) is when the Jewish nation is converted in a day to their Messiah (Zech. 12:10--14; Rom. 11:25--27). The Feast of Tabernacles (]{.class-0}[Sukkoth]{.class-1}[) is associated with the cleansing and rebuilding of the temple after Christ destroys the Antichrist and his image (see the comments on Hab. 2:18--20). All three of those feasts fall in the same month---]{.class-0}["the seventh month"]{.class-2}[ (Lev. 23:24, 27, 34)---September/October on a Jewish calendar. This clearly marks the Second Advent as taking place in that month.]{.class-0}

[Of those three feasts, the one that stands out in connection to the Second Advent is the Feast of Tabernacles. That is the one feast referred to as ]{.class-0}["the feast of the LORD"]{.class-2}[ (Hos. 9:5 cf. 12:9 and comments on those two passages in Vol. I of this Commentary). That is the feast observed by the Jews when they return to the land (Ezra 3:4; Nah. 8:18). It is the feast typified on the Mount of Transfiguration (Matt. 17:4), which is a picture of Christ's return in power (Matt. 16:28; 2 Pet. 1:16--18). It is the feast observed in the Millennium (Zech. 14:16--18). So it is the Feast of Tabernacles that is connected with Haggai's name.]{.class-0}

[Although the historical application of Haggai is to the rebuilding of the Temple under Zerubbabel and Joshua the high priest (see Ezra 5:1--2), the ]{.class-0}[doctrinal application ]{.class-1}[goes far beyond anything that took place in Ezra and Nehemiah. Look at Haggai 2:9. There is a divine promise of ]{.class-0}[international peace]{.class-1}[ on a ]{.class-0}[worldwide]{.class-1}[ scale (cf. Luke 2:14). Nothing like that ever took place in Zerubbabel's Temple or Herod's Temple. It doesn't take place until the Prince of Peace returns and sits in the Holy of Holies of the temple that will be rebuilt in the near future. Nothing that the League of Nations or NATO or the UN or the EU does will change that, and any attempt made by them will end in utter, complete failure every time they try it.]{.class-0}

[]{#section-0_1_a6591554de3033ad_b68a.xhtml}

CHAPTER ONE

1:1 In the second year of Darius the king, in the sixth month, in the first day of the month, came the word of the LORD by Haggai the prophet unto Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Joshua the son of Josedech, the high priest, saying,

2 Thus speaketh the LORD of hosts, saying, This people say, The time is not come, the time that the LORD'S house should be built.

3 Then came the word of the LORD by Haggai the prophet, saying,

4 Is it time for you, O ye, to dwell in your cieled houses, and this house lie waste?

5 Now therefore thus saith the LORD of hosts; Consider your ways.

6 Ye have sown much, and bring in little; ye eat, but ye have not enough; ye drink, but ye are not filled with drink; ye clothe you, but there is none warm; and he that earneth wages earneth wages to put it into a bag with holes.

7 Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Consider your ways.

8 Go up to the mountain, and bring wood, and build the house; and I will take pleasure in it, and I will be glorified, saith the LORD.

9 Ye looked for much, and, lo, it came to little; and when ye brought it home, I did blow upon it. Why? saith the LORD of hosts. Because of mine house that is waste, and ye run every man unto his own house.

10 Therefore the heaven over you is stayed from dew, and the earth is stayed from her fruit.

11 And I called for a drought upon the land, and upon the mountains, and upon the corn, and upon the new wine, and upon the oil, and upon that which the ground bringeth forth, and upon men, and upon cattle, and upon all the labour of the hands.

In Haggai, chapter 1 deals with the historical rebuilding of the Temple, and in chapter 2, you get into prophecies on the Second Advent.

[The ]{.class-0}["Darius"]{.class-2}[ of verse 1 is not Darius the ]{.class-0}[Mede]{.class-1}[ from the book of Daniel (see Dan. 5:31--6:1). That Darius was a viceroy Cyrus left in charge of the kingdom while he finished his conquest of the Babylonian Empire. This Darius was a ]{.class-0}[Persian]{.class-1}[ who came much later.]{.class-0}

[Now when it comes to the identity of these Persian Kings in Ezra, Nehemiah, and Esther, there are all kinds of guesses by the scholars.
